name: Terraco Terrabond Cp Surface Bonding Primer 68125
description:
Terrabond CP, is a highly advanced acrylic based primer filled with micro silica sand which bonds strongly to most building substrates including fairfaced concrete to enhance adhesion of surface for gypsum plaster, cement plaster or adhesives. By forming a textured and solid surface, it strengthens the adherence of shinny and low absorption rates of concrete surfaces. It prevents rapid water loss of the plaster to be applied and formation of cracks in connection.

PROPERTIES
The aqueous, acrylic based Terrabond CP product has the following properties:

  • Deeply penetrates to the surface
  • By creating a textured surface it enhances adherence
  • Breathable
  • It is water resistant
  • Does not contain toxic substances

AREAS OF USE

For exterior and interior use on ceilings, concrete and gypsum plaster walls with poor adhesion or for use to increase adhesion purposes between normal plasters.

PREPARATION OF SURFACE

Ensure that dust, dirt and foreign substances are cleaned off of the application surface. Also ensure that the surface does not contain salt, oil, grease substances and does not have any loose or defective areas. Mask off jointing areas not to be covered.

APPLICATION

Terrabond CP is to be thinned 50% by weight with water, depending on the surface condition it may be applied with a roller once or a few times. The surface and ambient temperature should not be below +5°C Wash tools with water thoroughly after application.

HEALTH & SAFETY

Avoid prolong contact with eyes and skin. Flush eyes with water, holding eye lids apart and seek medical attention. Keep away from children. For more information refer to relevant material data safety sheet.

PACKING & STORAGE

errabond CP is supplied in 15 KG plastic pails. Store containers away from direct sunlight, extreme heat and cold in a clean and dry area. Unopened containers can be stored for 12 months. Use oldest material first.

name: Terraco Styrobond Dp Eifs Basecoat/adhesive
short_description: Styrobond DP is a basecoat and adhesive for the Terraco EIFS Exterior Insulation Finishing System, available in dry powder form. Application Method:Trowel Grades:Acrylic
description:
Product Overview

Styrobond DP is a basecoat and adhesive for the Terraco EIFS Exterior Insulation Finishing System. It is easy to use by just adding water, improving on-site quality control. It shows excellent adhesion between substrate and expanded polystyrene boards when used as an adhesive. It also provides an excellent basecoat for embedding glass fibre mesh on top of which EIFS finishing coat is applied.

Properties

Water resistant
Excellent adhesion
Good flexural strength
Good impact resistance
Easy to use

Areas Of Use

Styrobond DP is used as an adhesive between mineral substrates and expanded polystyrene boards (EPS boards). Styrobond DP is used as an embedding mortar applied over EPS (expanded polystyrene), XPS (extruded polystyrene) and mineral wool panels to embed the glass fibre mesh prior to application of finish coats.

Application Method

Mixing Instructions:

Styrobond DP should be mixed on site with water in the ratio of approximately 4 parts Styrobond DP to 1 part water by weight, mixing with a high speed mixer for 3-5 minutes. Allow the material to stand for 10 minutes, remix and use. Mix only enough material for immediate use.

Application Method:

When used as an adhesive, apply to the EPS board and press into place using a level. Do not allow adhesive to skin before fixing in place. When used as an embedding mortar, apply a coat of Styrobond DP mix to the EPS board and embed the mesh using a trowel. Apply another coat of mix to the surface to ensure full cover of the mesh and an overall thickness of approximately 3mm.

Clean tools and equipment with water after use.

add_to_cart.description: Read more about “Terraco Styrobond Dp Eifs Basecoat/adhesive”

name: Terraco Terol Granule Tyrolean Rendering
short_description: Terol Granule is a trowel applied mineral based decorative render with a medium grain finish.
description:
Product Overview

One of the more popular mineral based renders prized for its even, attractive, granular look, Terol Granule is extensively used on residential and commercial properties as a seamless finish. Incorporating a mixture of crushed and precisely graded laminar, inert extenders, special cements, limes and additives, Terol Granule provides protection of exterior facades and is overcoated with Terracoat Stain.

Properties

• Excellent pollution resistant properties.
• Extremely stable against UV light.
• Polymer modified.
• Good mechanical strength.
• On-site mixing.
• Vapour permeable.

Areas Of Use

• Designed for exterior facades made of concrete, cement rendering, lightweight concrete, and fairfaced brickwork / blockwork, but is also usable on interior surfaces.
• Primarily used for EIFS systems.
• Applied by steel trowel.
• Grades: 1.0mm, 2.0mm.

Application Method

Prepare substrate by removing all loose and friable matter. Stop and fill where necessary. Ensure that the surface is clean, dry and sound.

New Work
Apply Terraco Terol Granule and overcoat with two coats of Terraco Terracoat Stain to colour and texture as per architecturally approved sample.

Redecoration
Protect all adjacent areas not to be covered. All cracks, chips, voids and damages should be repaired with an appropriate filler. Prepare by removing all loose and flaking paint, grease, dirt and grime. Where necessary prime exposed areas appropriately. Proceed as for new work.

name: Terraco Handycoat Ez-joint Ready-mixed Gypsum Board Jointing Compound 63166
short_description:
Handycoat EZ-Joint is a high-performance, easy-to-apply jointing compound for gypsum boards, delivering exceptional adhesion and low shrinkage for durable, crack-resistant finishes.

Application Method:SpatulaTrowel Grades:Acrylic
description:
Product Overview

Handycoat EZ-Joint is a ready-mixed interior jointing compound designed for the efficient and effective jointing of gypsum boards. Its formulation combines acrylic polymers and graded fillers to ensure easy application, excellent adhesion, and low shrinkage, reducing the likelihood of cracking.

Properties

The properties of Handycoat EZ-Joint include:

Low Shrinkage: Specifically formulated to minimize shrinkage, thereby reducing the risk of cracking and ensuring a smoother finish.
High Adhesion: Exhibits excellent adhesive properties, ensuring strong bonding with various surfaces and improving the durability of the jointing work.
Ease of Application: Designed for straightforward and efficient application, facilitating a quicker and more comfortable jointing process.
Quick Drying: Offers faster drying times compared to conventional jointing compounds, enabling quicker progression to subsequent finishing stages.
Vapor Permeability: Allows for moisture transfer, which helps in preventing moisture accumulation and mold growth, enhancing the healthiness of the environment.
Acrylic Polymer and Graded Filler Composition: A blend of acrylic polymers and precisely graded fillers ensures a consistent, high-quality finish.
Versatility in Application: Suitable for a range of uses including gypsum board jointing, fixing metal corner beading, patching plaster cracks, and skimming walls and ceilings.
Technical Specifications:
Can be diluted with water if necessary.
Coverage of 1.7 kg/m².
Maximum layer thickness of 3mm per layer.
Specific gravity of 1.70.
Available in 5 and 25 kg packaging.
These properties make Handycoat EZ-Joint a versatile, high-performance jointing compound, ideal for achieving durable, crack-resistant finishes in various interior applications.

Areas Of Use

Handycoat EZ-Joint is designed for a variety of interior applications, including:

Gypsum Board Jointing: Ideal for seamless jointing of gypsum board panels, providing a smooth, crack-resistant finish.
Fixing Metal Corner Beading: Suitable for securely fixing metal corner beads on walls and ceilings, ensuring a sharp, clean finish.
Patching Plaster Cracks: Effective for repairing cracks in plaster surfaces, ensuring a smooth and consistent surface.
Filling on Cementitious Surfaces: Can be used to fill and smooth cementitious surfaces, preparing them for painting or further finishing.
Skimming Walls and Ceilings: Perfect for skimming over walls and ceilings to create a level, uniform surface ready for decoration.
Application on Various Substrates: Compatible with interior cement boards, concrete walls, plastered concrete, and other cementitious materials.
These areas of use make Handycoat EZ-Joint a versatile and practical choice for various interior jointing, repairing, and finishing tasks, providing professional results in both DIY and commercial settings.

Application Method

The application method for Handycoat EZ-Joint involves the following steps:

Surface Preparation: Ensure the surface is clean, dry, and free from dust, grease, and loose material. For gypsum boards, ensure that the edges are properly prepared for jointing.
Mixing: If necessary, dilute the compound with a small amount of water to achieve the desired consistency. Mix well before use.
Applying to Gypsum Board Joints:
Apply a thin layer of EZ-Joint over the joint using a trowel or spatula.
Place a strip of jointing tape (paper tape or self-adhesive mesh) over the freshly applied compound.
Apply another layer of EZ-Joint over the tape, ensuring it is fully covered and smooth.
Fixing Metal Corner Beading:
Apply the compound along the corner where the beading is to be placed.
Press the metal corner bead into the compound and apply another layer of EZ-Joint over it, smoothing it out.
Patching and Skimming:
Apply the compound to cracks, holes, or areas needing skimming with a trowel or spatula.
Spread it evenly to cover the imperfections or create a smooth surface.
Drying Time: Allow the compound to dry thoroughly. The drying time will depend on the thickness of the application, temperature, and humidity.
Sanding: Once dry, sand the area lightly to achieve a smooth, even finish.
Further Coats: If necessary, apply further coats, allowing each layer to dry and sanding between coats.
Final Preparation: Ensure the surface is dust-free and smooth before painting or applying further finishes.
Cleaning: Clean tools and equipment with water immediately after use.
Following these steps ensures a high-quality finish, leveraging Handycoat EZ-Joint’s properties for efficient and effective jointing and finishing in interior spaces.

name: Terraco Handycoat Lite Light Weight Filler For Interior Use 63160
description:
OVERVIEW
Handycoat Lite is a light weight ready to use fillers and board jointing compounds for most building surfaces, including sand / cement render and gypsum board. It gives a high quality, even surface for painting. Handycoat is specially manufactured for the painter to repair and touch up interior surfaces, both old and new, prior to painting.

PROPERTIES
Handycoat Lite has the low shrinkage and flexibility normally associated with a taping grade and the ease of sanding normally associated with a topping grade. Handycoat Lite is based on a combination of acrylic polymers and light weight fillers. The product has the following properties:

  • Easy to use.
  • 0% lighter in weight.
  • Higher flexibility.
  • Lower shrinkage.
  • Easy sanding.
  • Application up to 6mm
  • Quick drying.

AREAS OF USE

When dry, Handycoat Lite bonds extremely well to, cementitious materials, gypsum, gypsum boards, sprayplasters, wood and all common building surfaces. Ideal as a gypsum board jointing compound and skimcoat, for patching hairline cracks in walls, ceilings, repairing damage to plaster/paint work, nail holes in woodwork, making good around door architrave’s and along the top of skirtings, etc.

PREPARATION OF SURFACE
Ensure that all dust, dirt and foreign matter are scraped and brushed away. Also ensure the surfaces are free from salts, oil, grease and ridges, and protect all adjacent surfaces not to be covered. Apply Penetrating Primer on all dusting surfaces.

APPLICATION & CLEANING OF TOOLS Apply the filler in a thin even layer. If a thick coat is necessary, apply several thin layers, allowing to dry between layers. Lightly sand the final surface before painting, within 24 hour of application. Clean tools and equipment with water after use.

HEALTH & SAFETY
Avoid prolonged contact with eyes and skin. For detailed information refer to relevant material safety data sheet.

PACKAGING & STORAGE
Handycoat Lite is supplied in 4kg and 18kg containers. Store containers in a clean dry area protected from direct sunlight and extreme heat and cold. Unopened containers can be stored for 12 months. Use oldest material first.

add_to_cart.description: Add to cart: “Terraco Handycoat Lite Light Weight Filler For Interior Use 63160”

name: Terraco Handycoat Exterior Ready-mixed Filler For Exterior Use 63250
short_description: Handycoat Exterior is a ready-mixed skimcoat for levelling exterior masonry and cement fibre board surfaces.
description:
Product Overview

Handycoat Exterior is a ready to use filler for use on all common building surfaces, including timber. It gives a high quality, even surface for painting. Handycoat Exterior is specifically manufactured for the painter to repair and touch up exterior and interior surfaces, both new and old, prior to painting. It is designed for filling joints, hairline cracks etc. by hand application.
Unlike conventional fillers, Handycoat Exterior has elastic properties, does not flake off, is permanent and retains its adhesion.

Properties

Handycoat Exterior is formulated using acrylic binders and precisely graded fillers. Properties include:
Tough durable filler
Weather resistant
Alkali resistant
Easy to apply
Quick drying
High crack resistance
Excellent adhesion

Areas Of Use

Handycoat Exterior is suitable for exterior as well as interior surfaces. When dry, Handycoat Exterior is weather resistant and bonds extremely well to cementitious materials, gypsum, gypsum boards, Sprayplaster and wood.
It is used as a thin coat filler for patching hairline cracks in walls, ceilings, soffits, repair to damaged plasterwork, paintwork, filling holes and defects in woodwork, making good to exposed concrete, filling of dents in galvanised and anti-rust primed metal.

Application Method

Surface Preparation
Ensure dust, dirt, foreign matter are brushed away. Ridges and form oil should be removed. When applying filler to old painted surfaces first wash down with soda / water solution, rinse and allow to dry before filling.
To stabilise a surface which shows signs of dusting or flaking, the use of Penetrating Primer is recommended.
Application:
Apply the filler in a thin, even layer; if the area under repair requires a thick coat, apply several thin layers, allowing each layer to dry before adding the next. Lightly sandpaper over the dry final surface before painting preferably within 9 hours of application.
Clean tools and equipment with water after use.

add_to_cart.description: Add to cart: “Terraco Handycoat Exterior Ready-mixed Filler For Exterior Use 63250”

name: Terraco Sprayplaster Spray Applied Readymixed Plasters
description:
Sprayplasters are acrylic based, ready to use compounds of inert filler materials, for use on all common types of interior building surfaces. They give a high quality, even surface for painting or other finishes. TERRACO Sprayplasters are suitable for both precast and conventional buildings. They can be applied directly to either new or old solid surfaces of pre-cast concrete, aerated concrete, sand/cement, fairfaced and level brickwork, etc. When used for finishing ceilings, the final coat may be left spray textured, in which case no further decoration is required. The finished Sprayplaster surface does not require priming before painting. TERRACO Sprayplaster is available in a range of grades for differing application thickness.

PROPERTIES TERRACO
Sprayplasters are ready-mixed for use compounds, formulated from a selected blend of acrylic polymers and precisely graded fillers. The products are: • Easy to use • Do not flake off
• Have high adhesion power
• Have high coverage
• Quick drying
• Vapour permeable

Basecoat For use on all types of construction substrates as a basecoat to level and rectify irregularities up to 10 mm thickness. Can be modified with Sprayplaster CM to give a harder, water resistant substrate. When modified, the plaster requires curing for up to 72 hours after application.

Finishcoat For use in all areas requiring up to 3mm coat thickness. For use as a finishing coat for Sprayplaster Basecoat. When used for finishing ceilings, the final coat may be left spray textured, in which case no further decoration is required.

Washable This is specially formulated water resistant version of Finishcoat for damp areas. AREA OF USE TERRACO Sprayplasters are suitable for both pre- cast and conventional buildings. They can be applied directly to either new or old solid surfaces of pre-cast concrete, aerated concrete, sand/cement, fairfaced and level brickwork, etc.

STOPPAGE OF WORK
When work stops for short periods, simply immerse the spray gun in water, wash around the top of machine and cover remaining Sprayplaster with a thin layer of water. When work resumes, remove the excess water from the machine and commence spraying.

APPLICATION & CLEANING OF TOOLS TERRACO
Sprayplaster is ready for use, but can be diluted with 2-3 % water if required. Patch and repair uneven/damaged surfaces. Spray the first coat and level with steel edged spatula. Excess material on the spatula should be returned to the machine. If required, apply a second coat of Sprayplaster Basecoat. Finish the surface with 1 or 2 coats of Sprayplaster Finishcoat. Clean tools and equipment with water after use.

HEALTH & SAFETY
Avoid prolonged contact with eyes and skin. For detailed information refer to relevant material safety data sheet. PACKAGING & STORAGE Product is supplied in 25kg containers. Store containers in a clean dry area protected from direct sunlight and extreme heat and cold. Unopened containers can be stored for 9 months. Use oldest material first.

Finishcoat 63410
Washable 63430
Basecoat 63460

name: Terraco Flexicoat Waterproof Acrylic Roof Coating 66110
description:
Product Overview

A one-pack, positive pressure, roof coating which provides a highly flexible waterproof coating with excellent weather resistance and long life flexibility. Ideally suited for use in areas with extreme climatic conditions. It is applied by brush or spray and after drying can be walked upon uncovered.

Properties

Flexicoat is a blend of weather resistant pigments, fillers and acrylic resins with the following properties:
Waterproof and weatherproof coating.
Allows surface to breath while remaining strongly anchored to the substrate.
Provides a seamless coating.
High flexibility.
Fast drying.
Reflects Ultra-Violet (light) rays.

Areas Of Use

Flexicoat is designed for application on roofs constructed from a wide variety of materials, i.e. concrete, light weight concrete, roof tiles, wood, galvanised steel, asphalt and asbestos cement. Ensure a slope of 1:75 is maintained to avoid ponding.

Application Method

Preparation
Ensure dust, dirt and foreign matter are removed from roof surfaces. All cracks should be made good with TERRACO Acrylic Filler. Before overcoating old substrates in humid tropical areas surfaces should first be washed down with a solution of household bleach 12 hours before re- coating to prevent the re-growth of fungi and algae.

Priming
If substrate is porous, it is best to use TERRACO Penetrating Primer prior to Flexicoat application.

Application
Flexicoat can be applied by spray or brush, embedding glass fibre scrim in areas which require reinforcement. Allow to dry and apply another coat to give an overall consumption of approximately 1-1.5kg/m2. Do not apply if rain is threatening, as Flexicoat is not resistant to rain until fully dry.
Clean tools and equipment with water after use.

add_to_cart.description: Add to cart: “Terraco Flexicoat Waterproof Acrylic Roof Coating 66110”

name: Terraco Terrafix W32 C2te S1 Flexible Tile Adhesive
description:
OVERVIEW PRODUCT GRADES/CODES Terrafix W32 is a flexible wall tile adhesive with excellent non-slump and extended open time characteristics. Terrafix W32 complies with the requirements as per EN12004 and passes all tests required for C2TE S1 classified adhesives. Terrafix W32 is suitable for interior and exterior walls for use on all types of masonry substrates such as sands/cement render, precast concrete, gypsum board, etc. Terrafix W32 is both hydraulically and organically bound, guaranteeing excellent adhesion of the tile to the surface.

PROPERTIES
• Excellent adhesion
• Non-slump
• Easy workability
• Water resistant
• Extended open time
• Flexible

AREAS OF USE
Fixing ceramic and stone on existing tiled surfaces, fixing tiling onto surface waterproofed with Terraco Weathercoat where an extended open time is required.

PREPARATION OF SURFACE
Ensure that the surface to be covered is clean and free of foreign matter. Absorbent and porous substrate should be wetted thoroughly with water prior to the application of Terrafix W32. Dusting surfaces should be treated with a penetrating primer.

MIXING
Add about 5,75- 6,25 litres of water to 25kg of Terrafix W32 and mix thoroughly to a thick and creamy consistency for 3-5 minutes with a high speed mixer. Let it stand for 5 minutes, remix and use.

APPLICATION & CLEANING OF TOOLS Apply Terrafix W32 in a layer approximately 3mm thick to the surface with the smooth side of a notched trowel. Pull the trowel through the applied layer with the notched edge. Push the tiles into place so that full adhesion is obtained. Fix tiles before the adhesive has surface dried. Plan work accordingly. Prepared material must be used within 1 hour. Clean tools and equipment with water after use.

SPACING OF JOINTS
To ensure even spacing, tile spacers of the required thickness are recommended.
GROUTING
Refer to Terragrout data sheet for details.
EXPANSION JOINTS Expansion joints, when necessary, should be incorporated in the design stage.
HEALTH & SAFETY Avoid prolonged contact with eyes and skin. For detailed information refer to relevant material safety data sheet.
PACKAGING & STORAGE
Terrafix W32 is supplied in 25kg craft bags. Store containers in a clean dry area protected from direct sunlight and extreme heat and cold. Unopened containers can be stored for 12 months. Use oldest material first.

add_to_cart.description: Add to cart: “Terraco Terrafix W32 C2te S1 Flexible Tile Adhesive”

name: Terraco Terrabond A Acrylic Bonding Agent 68210
short_description: Highly concentrated acrylic bonding agent
description:
Product Overview

Terrabond A is an extremely versatile bonding agent for use with all cementitious materials, lime washes, plasters, etc. It can be used to pre-treat substrates as an adhesion-promoting agent and as a primer/ sealer for decorative coatings.
Terrabond A is a highly concentrated and economical-to-use product, specifically developed for the most demanding situation. It increases the compressive, tensile and flexural strengths of mortars and reduces the water/ cement ratio.
Terrabond A can be used with confidence on all exterior and interior surfaces.

Properties

Terrabond A is a non-toxic, non-inflammable, acrylic resin. It can be used to pre-treat substrates as an adhesion-promoting agent and as a primer/ sealer for decorative coatings. It is also used to increases the compressive, tensile and flexural strengths of mortars and reduces the water/ cement ratio.
This product can be used with confidence on all exterior and interior surfaces.

Areas Of Use

As primer for AAC Blocks to reduce porosity
As a primer or sealer for decorative coatings
For repairing surfaces (bonding agent)
Plaster and screed additive
For tile fixing (surface consolidating primer and additive)
For cement based paints and as lime wash additive

name: Terraco Handycoat Flex Flexible/paintable Crack Filler 64230
short_description: Terraco Handycoat Crack Filler is a ready-mixed paintable crack filler for exterior and interior use.
description:
Product Overview

Handycoat Crack Filler is a ready-to-use flexible crack filler recommended for use on all common building surfaces. It is specially manufactured for the painter to repair and touch-up exterior and interior surfaces. It is designed for filling joints, hairline cracks etc.
Unlike conventional fillers, Handycoat Crack Filler has elastic properties, does not flake off, is permanent and retains its adhesion.

Properties

Easy to apply
Highly flexible
Excellent adhesion
Excellent impact resistance

Areas Of Use

Suitable for interior & exterior surfaces.
It is weather resistant and bonds extremely well to a wide range of materials, including: cementitious materials, gypsum boards, sprayplaster, wood, galvanized and primed antirust steel surfaces, etc.

Application Method

Surface Preparation
Ensure the substrate is sound. Using a putty knife, cut along the cracks in a V shape. The maximum openings of the cracks should be 5 mm wide x 3 mm deep. Remove all the dust, dirt, foreign matter, plaster debris, etc. from the surface completely. Apply a diluted coat of Terraco Terrabond A (1:5 with water) to the opened crack by brush.

Application:
Infill the crack openings using Handycoat Crack Filler and allow it to dry. Ensure the crack filling is done in a crisscross pattern. Allow to dry for 6-8 hours and apply a second coat (if necessary) to achieve full levelling. If required, lightly sand down the final surface before painting, preferably within 24 hours of application. Apply the filler in a thin, even layer (maximum 1 mm).
Clean tools and equipment with water after use.

Limitations:
Do not apply during rising temperatures to avoid the risk of out gassing resulting in pin-holing. Do not apply on bituminous coating. For exterior areas, do not apply if rain is likely over the next 24 hours.

add_to_cart.description: Add to cart: “Terraco Handycoat Flex Flexible/paintable Crack Filler 64230”

name: TEROSON SE 139 Elastic Acrylic Sealant For Indoor And Outdoor Use
short_description:
Flame-retardant (B-s1, d0 in acc. with DIN EN 13501) Quickly rainproof
Permanently elastic (25 % movement absorption)
Compatible with all kinds of paints
description:
Features and benefits

Gun-applied acrylic sealant for sealing structural and connection joints – indoor and outdoor use

Properties

Flame-retardant (B-s1, d0 in acc. with DIN EN 13501) Quickly rainproof
Permanently elastic (25 % movement absorption)
Compatible with all kinds of paints
Self-adhesive on most common building materials
Resistant to ageing and weathering

Description

TEROSON® SE 139 is a flame-retardant acrylic sealant (B-s1, d0 in acc. with DIN EN 13501) , designed forsealing joints on facade elements – indoors and outdoors and complies with DIN EN 15651-1, sealant type F-EXT-INT.

HOW TO USE TEROSON SE 139

SUBSTRATE PREPARATION

The surfaces to be bonded/joint edges must be clean, dry and free of grease. TEROSON SE 139 adheres without primer on substrates such as anodized and powder-coated aluminium, concrete, gas concrete, aerated concrete, varnished wood (closed-pore or openpore), brickwork and rigid PVC.

APPLICATION

When using compressed air, a pressure of 2 to 5 bars is required, depending on nozzle diameter and application speed. Uneven areas can be smoothed over with a trowel, paint brush or jointing iron after slightly moistening the tool or sealant surface with water.

CLEANING

Immediately remove excess sealant or stains with a wet cloth or spirit. After curing, the sealant can only be removed mechanically.

name: Sikasil WS-605 S 600ml – Best Before end of 10/06/2026 – Clearance
short_description:
Best Before end of 10/06/2026 Clearance
High-performance, non-streaking silicone weatherproofing sealant, CE-marked

Sikasil® WS-605 S is a durable, neutral-curing silicone sealant with a high movement capability and excellent adhesion to a wide range of substrates. Non-streaking properties on non-porous substrates and non-staining properties on porous substrates. It is particularly suited as a weather seal for structural glazing, curtain walling and windows.
description:
PRODUCT BENEFITS

  • Non-streaking on non-porous substrates
  • Non-staining properties on porous substrates
  • Outstanding UV and weathering resistance
  • Adheres well to glass, metals, coated / painted metals, plastics and wood
  • Meets requirements of ISO 11600 F 25 LM & G 25 LM, EN 15651-1 F EXT-INT CC 25LM, EN 15651-2 G CC 25LM, ASTM C 920 for Type S, Grade NS, Class 50 (movement capability ± 50 %), ASTM C 1248, AENOR Marca N F+G 25 LM
  • Provided with CE-mark according to EN 15651-1:2012, F EXT-INT CC 25LM, EN 15651-2:2012, G CC 25LM, certified by Control Body 1119
  • SNJF Façade & Vitrage 25 E (product code: 2885, 2891) for colors Black, Grey and White
  • Complies with common VOC requirements:
    Indoor Air Comfort: pass, EMICODE: EC1 Plus, French VOC Regulation: A+, BREEAM International (v.6 2021)/BREEAM NOR (v.6 2022): Exemplary Level, M1: pass, Global LEED v4/v4.1 beta EQc 2: Low-Emitting Materials: CDPH-IAQ SCAQMD Rule 1168

Usage

Sikasil® WS-605 S can be used for weatherproofing and sealing applications where durability under severe conditions is required. It is particularly suited as a weather seal for structural glazing, curtain walling and windows. This product is suitable for experienced professional users only. Tests with actual substrates and conditions have to be performed ensuring adhesion, non-staining and material compatibility.

Packaging

Unipack 600 ml

Typical Product Data

Chemical base 1-component silicone
Colour (CQP001-1) Various colors available A

 
Cure mechanism Moisture-curing

 
Cure type Neutral
Density (uncured)  

 

 

 

 

 

 1.43 kg/l

 

 

 

 
Non-sag properties (CQP061-4 / ISO 7390) Good

 

 
Application temperature ambient 5 ─ 40 °C

 
Skin time (CQP019-1) 25 minutes B

 

 
Tack free time (CQP019-3) 120 minutes B

 
Curing speed (CQP049-1) (see diagram)

 
Shore A hardness (CQP023-1 / ISO 48-4) 30 C

 

 
Tensile strength (CQP036-1 / ISO 527) 1.0 MPa
100 % modulus (CQP036-1 / ISO 527) 0.3 MPa
Elongation at break (CQP036-1 / ISO 527) 800 %
Tear propagation resistance (CQP045-1 / ISO 34) 4.0 N/mm

 
Service temperature -40 ─ 150 °C
Shelf life cartridge / unipack / pail

drum

 

 12 months D

6 months D

 

 
CQP = Corporate Quality Procedure A) color defined by local sales organization B) 23 °C / 50 % r. h.
C) after 28 days D) storage below 25 °C

 

Application Information

Surface Preparation

Surfaces must be clean, dry and free from grease, oil and dust. Surface treatment depends on the specific nature of the substrates and is crucial for a long lasting bond.

Application

The optimum temperature for substrate and sealant is between 15 °C and 25 °C.
Sikasil® WS-605 S can be processed with hand, pneumatic or electric driven piston guns as well as pump equipment. For advice on selecting and setting up a suitable pump system, contact the System Engineering Department of Sika Industry.
Joints must be properly dimensioned.

For optimum performance the joint width needs to be designed according to the movement capability of the sealant based on the actual expected movement. The minimum joint depth is 6 mm and a width / depth ratio of minimum 2 : 1 and maximum 4 : 1 must be respected. Joints deeper than 15 mm must be avoided.

For backfilling it is recommended to use closed cell, sealant compatible foam backer rods e.g. high resilience polyethylene foam rod. If joints are too shallow for backing material to be employed, we recommend using a polyethylene tape. This acts as a release film (bond breaker), allowing the joint to move and the silicone to stretch freely.

Tooling and finishing

Tooling and finishing must be carried out within the skin time of the sealant or adhesive.

When tooling freshly applied Sikasil® WS-605 S, press the adhesive to the joint flanks to get a good wetting of the bonding surface. No tooling agents must be used.

Removal

Uncured Sikasil® WS-605 S can be removed from tools and equipment with Sika® Remover-208 or another suitable solvent. Once cured, the material can only be removed mechanically.

Hands and exposed skin have to be washed immediately using hand wipes such as Sika® Cleaner-350H cleaning towels or a suitable industrial hand cleaner and water. Do not use solvents on skin.

Overpainting

Sikasil® WS-605 S cannot be overpainted.

Application Limits

Most Sikasil® WS, SG, IG and WT, silicones manufactured by Sika are compatible with each other. For specific information regarding compatibility between various Sikasil® products contact the Technical Department of Sika Industry.
To exclude materials influencing Sikasil® WS-605 S, all materials such as gaskets, tapes, setting blocks, sealants, etc., in direct and indirect contact have to be approved by Sika in advance.
Where two or more different reactive sealants are used, allow the first to cure completely before applying the next. Sikasil® WS-605 S may only be used in combination with structural glazing applications after a detailed examination of the corresponding project details.
Do not use Sikasil® WS-605 S on PMMA and PC elements as it may cause environmental stress cracking (crazing).

 

Documents

name: Soudal Repair Express Cement 290 ml Tube
short_description:
Acrylic sealant with granular structure like cement
High speed acrylic polymer based, textured repair cement. For easy and quick reparation or filling of joints and cracks in concrete. Can be applied by trowel or gun. sandable and over-paintable once dried. Can be used for internal and external applications.
description:
Featured properties

High speed cement repair
Excellent adhesion to many mineral surfaces
Interior and exterior applications
Very fast curing
Textured finish
Paintable

Applications

For repairing holes and cracks in concrete and cement
Repairing of joints in brickwork
Repairing of damage in concrete stairs, etc.

Instructions

Remove any loose particles before applying Repair Express Cement. Apply with a caulking gun or putty knife into the joint or crack. Finishing with a wet spatula or trowel gives the smoothest result. For large cracks, static joints or large screw holes apply 2 layers of the product. Depending on the porosity of the substrate, apply the second layer of product after approx. 30 min.

name: fischer Plasterboard fixing DuoBlade S with screw – 545678
short_description:
High torque when anchor is installed for the feelgood-factor and an optimum feeling when setting.
Anti rotation lock prevents from spinning in the drill hole.
Use of commercially available hooks, screws and eyelets.
PZ2 drive – same drive for plug and screw.
Self-drilling plasterboard plug for fast and easy installation.
With appropriate screw.
description:
Fischer DuoBlade S 20 – Self-Drilling Plasterboard Fixing

The Fischer DuoBlade S 20 is a high-performance self-drilling plasterboard fixing designed for fast and efficient installation in drywall. Engineered for professional use, this innovative fixing eliminates the need for pre-drilling, making it ideal for tradespeople and installers working on time-sensitive projects. Whether you are fitting fixtures, mounting accessories, or completing interior installations, the DuoBlade provides a secure and reliable solution.

Designed with ease of use in mind, the fixing cuts directly into plasterboard with minimal effort, reducing installation time while maintaining strong holding performance. Suitable for a wide range of light to medium-duty applications, it is a practical choice for both professionals and serious DIY users.

Key Features and Benefits

  • Self-drilling design: Cuts directly into plasterboard without the need for pre-drilling, saving time on site
  • Strong holding performance: Provides secure anchoring for fixtures and fittings in drywall
  • Quick installation: Reduces labour time and simplifies fixing tasks
  • Versatile application: Suitable for a wide range of light to medium-duty loads
  • Clean and precise fixing: Minimises damage to plasterboard during installation
  • User-friendly: Ideal for both professionals and DIY users

Typical Applications

  • Fixing lightweight shelves, brackets, and fittings
  • Installing electrical fixtures and accessories
  • Mounting mirrors, pictures, and decorative items
  • Securing light-duty wall-mounted units
  • General-purpose fixing in plasterboard and drywall systems

Application and Surface Preparation

Installation of the Fischer DuoBlade is straightforward and efficient. The fixing is designed to be driven directly into plasterboard using a screwdriver or drill with a suitable bit. No pre-drilling is required, which significantly reduces installation time.

Before installation, ensure the plasterboard surface is sound and free from damage. Position the fixing and apply steady pressure while driving it into the board until it sits flush with the surface. Once installed, the screw can be inserted into the fixing to secure the fixture.

For best results, avoid overtightening the screw as this may affect holding performance. Always consider the weight of the item being fixed and ensure it is suitable for plasterboard applications.

Advantages

  • Speeds up installation compared to traditional wall plugs
  • Reduces the need for additional tools or preparation
  • Provides reliable fixing in plasterboard substrates
  • Suitable for a variety of interior fixing tasks
  • Improves efficiency on both small and large projects

Buy Fischer DuoBlade S 20 Online with Fast UK Delivery

Sealants4All, part of All4Construction Limited, is your trusted UK supplier for professional building materials. As an official distributor of leading brands such as Fischer, we supply genuine products that meet the demands of modern construction projects.

With competitive pricing and fast, reliable UK delivery, you can order the Fischer DuoBlade S 20 with confidence and keep your work on schedule. Choose Sealants4All for dependable products and efficient service every time.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the Fischer DuoBlade fixing used for?

The Fischer DuoBlade is designed for fixing items into plasterboard without pre-drilling. It is commonly used for mounting lightweight fixtures such as shelves, mirrors, and fittings. Its self-drilling design makes it a convenient solution for quick installation.

Can the DuoBlade be used on all plasterboard types?

The fixing is suitable for standard plasterboard and drywall installations. However, it is important to ensure the board is in good condition and capable of supporting the load. For heavier loads or specialist boards, alternative fixings may be required.

Do I need special tools to install this fixing?

No, the DuoBlade can be installed using a standard screwdriver or drill. Its self-drilling tip allows it to cut directly into the plasterboard. This makes installation simple and efficient for both professionals and DIY users.

Is the Fischer DuoBlade suitable for heavy loads?

The DuoBlade is intended for light to medium-duty applications. For heavier loads, it is recommended to use more heavy-duty anchors or fixings designed for higher load capacities. Always check the load requirements before installation.

Why should I shop from sealants4all.co.uk?

Sealants4All is part of All4Construction Limited and supplies professional building materials across the UK. We offer trusted brands such as Fischer, competitive pricing, and fast UK delivery. This ensures you receive reliable products quickly and efficiently for your projects.

name: Monocote
short_description:
A one coat coloured mineral plaster finished with a scratch trowel.

Application Method:TrowelSpray
description:
Product Overview
Ideal for creating that natural, earthy charm, where a building has an aged look from a past era.

Monocote is of interest to architects and interior designers where a particular themed architectural style is required. Furthermore, the appeal to builders is that this superior quality, coloured mineral based plaster is applied in a single coat.

The textured appearance is created by the applicator removing the top layer using a scratch trowel once the material has partly set, which exposes the natural aggregate. As the product is a full-bodied pigmented coating it does not require a top coat.

Properties
• A plastering and finishing system in one operation.
• Extremely stable against UV light.
• Good mechanical strength.
• Vapour permeable.

Areas Of Use
• Ideally suited to heritage styled residential apartments.
• Can be applied directly to clay brick, AAC block, precast concrete, in-situ concrete and stone.
• Ideal for creating a natural aged look for a Souk or theme park.
• Applied by trowel.

Application Method
Prepare substrate by removing all loose and friable matter. Stop and fill where necessary. Ensure that the surface is clean, dry and sound.

New Work
For AAC blocks: Apply 1 coat of Terraco P Primer to absorbent surfaces. Apply Terraco Monocote to colour and texture as per architecturally approved sample.
For precast or in-situ concrete: Apply a key coat as per manufacturer’s instructions. Apply Terraco Monocote to colour and texture as per architecturally approved sample.

Redecoration
Protect all adjacent areas not to be covered. All cracks, chips, voids and damages should be repaired with an appropriate filler. Prepare by removing all loose and flaking paint, grease, dirt and grime. Where necessary prime exposed areas appropriately. Proceed as for new work.

add_to_cart.description: Read more about “Monocote”

name: Renderlite
short_description:
A coloured mineral plaster, which is applied as a base coat for pebble-dash rendering.

Application Method:Trowel
description:
Product Overview
A traditional looking product using modern mineral render technology, Renderlite is a coloured mineral plaster which acts as a basecoat for pebble-dash rendering.

The beauty of Renderlite is that, while water repellent, it also allows the structure to breathe, has excellent dirt pick-up resistance and is extremely stable in severe climatic conditions. This makes it a popular option for architects replicating the traditional pebble-dash look or for renovation projects.

Properties
• An all-in-one plastering and finishing system.
• Excellent dirt pick-up resistance.
• Easily disguises substrate imperfections.
• Extremely stable against UV light.
• Exceptional mechanical strength and impact resistance.
• Controlled vapour permeability enabling the substrate to breathe.

Areas Of Use
• Designed for exterior facades.
• Can be applied directly on to clay brick, concrete block, AAC block, precast concrete, in-situ concrete and stone.
• The basecoat is trowel applied and finished by spraying or manually casting the marble chips over the entire surface and embedding them into the surface with a steel trowel or hairless roller.

Application Method
Prepare substrate by removing all loose and friable matter. Stop and fill where necessary. Ensure that the surface is clean, dry and sound.

New Work
A key coat is required on very smooth surfaces such as precast or in-situ concrete. Trowel apply Terraco Renderlite, tinted to the required colour, and while still wet manually or mechanically cast the pebble-dash into the basecoat and embed with a steel trowel applied in strict accordance with manufacturer’s instructions to colour and aggregate size as per approved architectural sample.

Redecoration
Protect all adjacent areas not to be covered. All cracks, chips, voids and damages should be repaired with an appropriate filler. Prepare by removing all loose and flaking paint, grease, dirt and grime. Where necessary prime exposed areas appropriately. Proceed as for new work.

name: Terol Ultra
short_description:
A quick setting polymer modified coloured mineral render with a controlled setting time to ensure early rain resistance and to avoid problems associated with wash-out.

Application Method:Trowel
description:
Product Overview
Rendering in adverse weather conditions?

Terol Ultra is a unique, quick setting, polymer modified, coloured mineral render. It is based on special mineral binders which ensure the product is colour stable. Terol Ultra has a controlled setting time to allow early rain resistance and to avoid problems associated with wash-off. Terol Ultra is an excellent substitute for silicone and acrylic based coatings which need to be applied in ambient and dry conditions.

Properties
• Rapid setting at low temperatures.
• Rapid setting at high humidity.
• Rain resistant in an hour.
• Efflorescence free finish.
• Vapour permeable.
• Algae and fungi resistant.
• Excellent durability.
• Colour stable – no additional stain required.

Areas Of Use
• A state of the art formulation designed for use in adverse weather conditions.
• Terol Ultra relies on a chemical reaction during the curing process enabling it to dry more quickly than acrylic or silicone based coatings therefore it is less susceptible to delamination and washoffs.
• It gives an almost identical appearance to Terracoat Granule.
• Ideal for Terraco EIFS.
• Mix with water on site.
• Applied by steel trowel.
• Grades: 1.0mm, 1.5mm, 2.0mm.

Application Method
Prepare substrate by removing all loose and friable matter. Stop and fill where necessary. Ensure that the surface is clean, dry and sound.

New Work
Apply a coat of Terraco P Primer Textured and allow to dry for 2-3 hours. Apply using a steel trowel, remove any excess material using the grain in the material as a guide. Allow material to set for 10-15 minutes, then finish surface by rubbing with a clean dry plastic trowel. Protect from rain for one hour.

Redecoration
Protect all adjacent areas not to be covered. All cracks, chips, voids and damages should be repaired with an appropriate filler. Prepare by removing all loose and flaking paint, grease, dirt and grime. Where necessary prime exposed areas appropriately. Proceed as for new work.

short_description:
A fine, low build textured coating applied by roller with a fine even stipple finish.

Application Method:RollerSpatula Grades:Pro (Acrylic)Ultra (Silicone)Flex (Elastomeric)
description:
Product Overview
A chic, low build, lightly textured, protective and decorative w all coating. Terracoat Smooth is easily applied using a lambswool roller, provides a seamless finish to achieve a modern look. However, when the product is applied by spatula it creates a more rustic, heritage stucco appearance.

Properties
• Low build and lightly textured.
• Bridges hairline cracks.
• Extremely tough and durable. (ASTM 4060)
• Weather and UV resistant.
• Vapour permeable (ASTM E96).
• High impact and abrasion resistance.
• Superior alkali resistance.
• Water based and environmentally friendly.

Areas Of Use
• Used on surfaces of concrete, cement, rendering, lightweight concrete, fairfaced stonework, brickwork, blockwork, plywood, antirust primed steel and galvanised steel. Performs equally well on interior surfaces of gypsum dry wall and chipboard.
• Used extensively on high-end developments, both housing and commercial.
• A roller applied lightly textured coating with low consumption rates makes it a very economical finish.
• Sometimes applied by spatula to create a more rustic Spanish plaster or heritage effect.

Application Method
Prepare substrate by removing all loose and friable matter. Stop and fill where necessary. Ensure that the surface is clean, dry and sound.

New Work
Apply one coat of Terraco P Primer Pigmented and allow to cure. Apply Terraco Terracoat Smooth (select required performance option*) with a sheepskin roller allowing for drying times between coats, as per approved architectural sample.

Redecoration
Protect all adjacent surfaces not to be covered. All cracks, chips, voids and damages should be repaired with an appropriate filler. Prepare by removing all loose and flaking paint, grease, dirt and grime. Spot prime exposed areas appropriately. Proceed as for new work.

name: Terracoat Craft
short_description:
Terracoat Craft (previously Terracoat Superfine) is a multi-textured coating applied by spray / roller and spatula to achieve various patterns from fine spray to roller stucco.

description:
Product Overview
A multifaceted coating depending on the application method. Terracoat Craft (previously Terracoat Superfine) provides a wide range of finishes from a fine spray to a spray and flattened stucco appearance. When sprayed and flattened, this product revives the 60’s and 70’s retro look and is often used on elevations which are rectangular in appearance.

Properties
• Can be applied multiple ways.
• Extremely tough and durable. (ASTM 4060)
• Excellent weather and UV resistance.
• Vapour permeable allowing substrate to breathe. (ASTM E96)
• Excellent impact and abrasion resistance.
• Water based and environmentally friendly.

Areas Of Use
• Designed primarily for exterior use.
• Can be applied to concrete, cement rendering, lightweight concrete, cement fibre boards and Sprayplaster.
• Extensively used on hotels and resorts, commercial complexes, retail centres and private residences.
• Applied by spray to create a sandy textured appearance, and sometimes the texture is flattened with a plastic roller to mimic 60’s and 70’s stucco.

Application Method
Prepare substrate by removing all loose and friable matter. Stop and fill where necessary. Ensure that the surface is clean, dry and sound.

New Work
Roller apply one coat of Terraco P Primer Textured and allow to cure. Apply Terraco Terracoat Craft (previously Terracoat Superfine (select required performance option*) to colour and texture as per approved architectural sample.

Redecoration
Protect all adjacent areas not to be covered. All cracks, chips, voids and damages should be repaired with an appropriate filler. Prepare by removing all loose and flaking paint, grease, dirt and grime. Spot prime exposed areas appropriately. Proceed as for new work.

name: Terralite Dash
short_description:
Incorporates the use of natural graded aggregate from the finest natural quartz crystals to create an attractive natural pebble-dash finish suitable for general masonry and Terraco EIFS.

Application Method: Spray
description:
Product Overview

History testifies that architects have always enthusiastically praised the raw beauty of exposed stone on a building. Terraco Terralite Dash incorporates the use of natural graded aggregate from the finest natural quartz crystals to create an attractive natural pebble-dash finish. It gives architects the freedom to design elements to meet their vision, creating a truly unique and stylised appearance on any project.

Properties

  • Excellent weather and UV resistance.
  • Excellent impact and abrasion resistance.
  • Outstanding flexibility qualities.
  • Easily hides substrate imperfections.
  • Vapour permeable allowing substrate to breathe. (ASTM E96)
  • Water based and environmentally friendly.

Areas Of Use

  • Used to simulate natural stone.
  • Designed primarily for exterior use.
  • Suitable for application to concrete, cement rendering, lightweight concrete, cement fibre boards, Sprayplaster as well as gypsum dry walls and chipboard.
  • Suitable for application on almost any type of project – hotels and resorts, condominiums, hospitals and medical centres, government offices and more.
  • Trowel apply the basecoat and while still wet manually or mechanically cast the pebble dash into the basecoat and embed into the backing plaster.
  • Ideal for Terraco EIFS.

Application Method

Prepare substrate by removing all loose and friable matter. Stop and fill where necessary. Ensure that the surface is clean, dry and sound.

New Work

Roller apply one coat of Terraco P Primer Textured and allow to cure. Trowel apply Terraco Terralite Dash Basecoat, tinted to the required colour, and while still wet manually or mechanically cast the Terraco Terralite Dash into the basecoat and embed using a plastic roller. Once cured, apply either one or two coats of Terraco Topcoat. The coating system must be applied in strict accordance with manufacturer’s instructions to colour and aggregate size as per approved architectural sample.

Redecoration

Protect all adjacent areas not to be covered. All cracks, chips, voids and damages should be repaired with an appropriate filler. Prepare by removing all loose and flaking paint, grease, dirt and grime. Spot prime exposed areas appropriately. Proceed as for new work.

name: fischer DuoTec 12 – 542590 – Pack of 10
description:
Easy to install nylon toggle for high loads in all panel building materials
Advantages
  • Flexible screw mount allows for the use of screws and hooks with different thread shapes.
  • Glass fibre-reinforced plastics and a metal skeleton insert (fischer DuoTec 12) allow the toggle to handle heavy tensile and transverse loads in all panel building materials.
  • Soft grey nylon contact surface distributes the load over the panel surface, thereby minimising weakening of the supporting building material.
  • Standard drill hole diameters and short tilting element for easy installation in narrow cavities, including cavities with insulation.
  • White flush sleeve with snap function allows the plug to be pre-installed quickly and securely in the drill hole.
  • With scale on the grip strap (fischer DuoTec 12) for determining the required screw length (scale value + 20 mm).
The nylon toggle fischer DuoTec for high tensile and transverse loads through 2 components. Easy installation with small drill hole diameters of 10 mm and short toggle element, even in narrow and insulated cavities. Easy pre-installation; the plug does not fall into the drill hole, even without a screw. No cutting, and thus no weakening of the gypsum plasterboard. The toggle element automatically folds behind the panel and gives it its strength. As a result of the flexible stainless steel screw seat, the gravity toggle can be used with wood and chipboard screws or metric hooks and threaded rods with lock nuts. If it hits something in the drill hole in solid building materials, it functions like an Expansion plug.

name: S4Proof RP 71 CEMENT BASED, SINGLE COMPONENT, ULTRA-RAPID SETTING WATER PLUGGING MORTAR
short_description: <p><strong>S4Proof RP 71</strong> is a cement-based, single-component, ultra-rapid setting water-plugging mortar designed to quickly seal active water leaks. It sets in seconds upon contact with water and forms a durable, impermeable layer. Suitable for interior and exterior use, it is ideal for sealing leaks in foundations, basements, retaining walls, and other concrete structures exposed to water pressure.</p>
description:
S4Proof RP 71 is a cement-based, single-component, ultra-rapid setting water-plugging mortar that is highly effective at sealing active water leaks. When it comes into contact with water, it sets in seconds, providing a quick and permanent seal. This product is ideal for use in foundations, basements, retaining walls, concrete pipes, elevator shafts, water tanks, pools, and other concrete structures that are exposed to active water leaks. S4Proof RP 71 does not shrink or crack, offering long-lasting durability and protection against water penetration.

✅ Advantages:

  • Quick-setting, forms an impermeable seal in seconds upon contact with water
  • Does not shrink, crack, or break after application
  • Non-toxic and chloride-free, making it safe for use on reinforced concrete
  • Ideal for sealing active water leaks in a variety of concrete surfaces
  • Easy to apply with gloves, no tools required
  • Suitable for both interior and exterior applications

📌 Application Areas:

  • Sealing active water leaks in foundations, basements, and retaining walls
  • Repair of concrete pipes, elevator shafts, and water tanks
  • Sealing cracks in wet or submerged concrete surfaces
  • Ideal for applications exposed to water pressure, such as pools, manholes, and tunnels
  • Effective for leak stopping in water tanks and swimming pools

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Cement-based, polymer-enhanced powder
Density 1.07 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Setting Time 2-3 seconds after contact with water
Bond Strength ≥ 1 N/mm²
Consumption 1-2 kg/m² (for sealing active leaks, depending on the size of the crack)
Color Options Grey

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • Wear gloves during application.
  • Take a small amount of S4Proof RP 71 powder in the palm of your hand and apply it directly to the water leak by pressing it in one motion.
  • Continue pressing the product until it sets.
  • After hardening, use a wire brush to level the surface and prepare it for subsequent applications if necessary.
  • Ensure that the leakage area is enlarged to at least 3×3 cm for better water pressure distribution.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in weather conditions below +5°C or above +30°C, or in high-temperature, windy conditions.
  • Not for use on movable cracks or general crack repair.
  • Do not apply on surfaces like plaster, wood, fiberboard, or metal.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean equipment with clean water immediately after use. Cured material can only be cleaned by mechanical means.
  • Store in a dry, moisture-free environment, away from frost. Shelf life is 12 months from the production date under proper storage conditions.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear protective gloves, goggles, and a mask during application.
  • Avoid contact with eyes, mouth, and skin. In case of contact, rinse immediately with plenty of water.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for further safety instructions.

add_to_cart.description: Add to cart: “S4Proof RP 71 CEMENT BASED, SINGLE COMPONENT, ULTRA-RAPID SETTING WATER PLUGGING MORTAR”

name: S4Proof CC 70 CEMENT BASED, SINGLE COMPONENT, CRYSTALLIZED WATERPROOFING MATERIAL
short_description: S4Proof CC 70 is a cement-based, single-component, crystallized waterproofing material that provides long-lasting protection against water penetration. It penetrates into concrete, filling capillary spaces and forming insoluble minerals to block water pathways. It is ideal for both positive and negative hydrostatic pressure applications, making it suitable for foundations, basements, retaining walls, and underground structures.
description:
S4Proof CC 70 is a high-performance, cement-based, single-component waterproofing material that works through crystallization. It is designed for both positive and negative hydrostatic pressure applications. By penetrating into the concrete and forming insoluble minerals in capillary spaces, it effectively blocks water pathways, providing long-lasting water resistance. This product is ideal for waterproofing foundations, basement walls, retaining walls, and other concrete structures exposed to water pressure. S4Proof CC 70 is easy to apply and can be used on both new and old concrete surfaces.

✅ Advantages:

  • Easy to apply without mixing, requiring no primer
  • Forms insoluble crystals that block water pathways
  • Provides long-lasting water impermeability
  • Can be applied on both new and old concrete surfaces
  • Effective under both positive and negative hydrostatic pressure
  • Resistant to water penetration, freeze-thaw cycles, and environmental factors

📌 Application Areas:

  • Waterproofing for foundations, retaining walls, and basement walls
  • Applications under positive and negative hydrostatic pressure
  • Used in water tanks, swimming pools, underground garages, and tunnels
  • Suitable for dams, concrete pipes, irrigation canals, and culverts
  • Waterproofing under curtain wall concretes

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Cement-based, polymer-enhanced powder
Density ~1.60 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Mixture Ratio 7.00-7.50 L water / 25 kg powder
Mortar Density 1.90-2.10 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Pot Life 30 minutes
Working Time 20 minutes
Full Curing Time 28 days
Consumption 2.50-3.00 kg/m² (for 2 mm thickness)

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • Ensure the surface is clean, smooth, and solid, and free from dust, oil, grease, and other contaminants.
  • Mix 7-7.5 liters of water per 25 kg of powder until a smooth, lump-free mixture is obtained.
  • Allow the mixture to rest for 3-5 minutes and then remix for 30 seconds before use.
  • Apply the mixed material in at least 2 coats with a brush or trowel. Each layer should be applied perpendicular to the previous layer.
  • Allow at least 6-12 hours drying time between coats.
  • If more than 12 hours pass between coats, re-moisten the surface before applying the next layer.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in temperatures below +5°C or above +30°C.
  • Avoid applying during rainy or windy weather conditions, or in areas at risk of freezing.
  • Ensure the surface is free from moisture before application.
  • Not suitable for use on surfaces such as wood, metal, fiberboard, or plaster.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean tools immediately after use with clean water.
  • Store in its original packaging in a dry, cool, and frost-free environment.
  • Shelf life is 12 months when stored under appropriate conditions.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear protective clothing, gloves, and masks during application.
  • Avoid contact with eyes and skin. In case of contact, rinse immediately with water and seek medical attention if necessary.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for further safety precautions.

name: S4Proof CA 63 WHITE CEMENT AND ACRYLIC BASED, TWO-COMPONENT, FULLY ELASTIC, UV RESISTANT, WATERPROOFING MATERIAL
short_description: S4Proof CA 63 is a two-component, white cement and acrylic-based, fully elastic waterproofing material. It offers high flexibility, crack-bridging capabilities, and UV resistance. Ideal for waterproofing foundations, terraces, balconies, and wet areas like swimming pools, it provides long-lasting protection and is impermeable to water, making it perfect for interior and exterior applications.
description:
S4Proof CA 63 is a high-performance, two-component, white cement and acrylic-based waterproofing material. It is designed to offer excellent crack-bridging properties and flexibility, ensuring long-lasting waterproofing protection for both interior and exterior surfaces. It is resistant to positive water pressure and provides a seamless and jointless waterproofing layer. The product also offers UV resistance and allows the surface to breathe, making it ideal for use on foundations, retaining walls, terraces, balconies, and wet areas such as swimming pools and water tanks.

✅ Advantages:

  • Easy to apply and forms a seamless, jointless waterproofing layer
  • Provides excellent crack-bridging properties (≥1.5 mm)
  • Fully elastic, allowing the material to move with the substrate
  • Highly resistant to UV degradation and weathering
  • Water vapor permeable, allowing the surface to breathe
  • Protects against water infiltration, including from unpressurized groundwater
  • Ideal for both interior and exterior applications

📌 Application Areas:

  • Waterproofing of foundations, retaining walls, and basement walls
  • Terraces, balconies, and wet areas like bathrooms and kitchens
  • Waterproofing under ceramic applications in swimming pools, water tanks, and fountains
  • Waterproofing for foundation, curtain, and basement walls
  • Protection against water penetration in concrete structures exposed to external elements

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure White cement-based, polymer-enhanced powder (Component A) and elastomeric resin (Component B)
Density (Component A) 1.45 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Density (Component B) 1.08 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Pot Life 30 minutes
Mixture Ratio 10 kg liquid (B) / 20 kg powder (A)
Bond Strength ≥ 1.50 N/mm² (EN 1542)
Crack Bridging (+20°C) ≥ 1.00 mm
Crack Bridging (-20°C) ≥ 1.00 mm
Capillary Water Absorption ≤ 0.10 kg/m²·h0.5 (EN 1062-3)
Pressured Water Resistance ≥ 5 bar positive (DIN 1048)
Full Drying Time Minimum 48 hours
Consumption 3.00-3.50 kg/m² (for 2 mm application thickness)

⚠️ Warnings:

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE), including gloves, goggles, and protective clothing.
  • Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case of contact, rinse with water immediately and seek medical advice if necessary.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for more detailed safety information.

name: S4Proof CA 60 CEMENT AND ACRYLIC BASED, TWO-COMPONENT, SUPER ELASTIC, WATERPROOFING MATERIAL
short_description: S4Proof CA 60 is a cement and acrylic-based, two-component waterproofing material that provides exceptional flexibility and crack-bridging properties. Ideal for both positive and negative water pressure applications, it is suitable for waterproofing foundations, retaining walls, basements, and terraces. The material forms a seamless, durable, and highly adhesive waterproof layer, ensuring long-lasting protection against water penetration.
description:
S4Proof CA 60 is a two-component, cement and acrylic-based waterproofing product designed to create a flexible, highly adhesive waterproof membrane. This material offers superior crack-bridging properties and resistance to both positive and negative water pressure, making it ideal for a wide range of applications. It is suitable for use in foundations, retaining walls, basements, terraces, balconies, and other surfaces exposed to water. The product is also resistant to sulphates, chlorine, and soil chemicals, protecting concrete surfaces from carbonation and chloride.

✅ Advantages:

  • Easy to apply and forms a seamless, jointless membrane
  • High flexibility and superior crack-bridging capability (up to 2.5 mm)
  • Resistant to both positive and negative water pressure
  • Provides high bonding strength to a variety of surfaces
  • Resistant to thermal shocks and environmental conditions
  • Water vapor permeable, allowing concrete to breathe
  • Resistant to sulphates, chlorine, and soil chemicals
  • Protects concrete surfaces from carbonation and chloride

📌 Application Areas:

  • Interior and exterior use
  • Waterproofing of foundations, retaining walls, and basements
  • Under ceramic applications for terraces, balconies, and water tanks
  • Waterproofing of wet areas such as swimming pools, water channels, and elevators
  • Waterproofing under tiles in bathrooms, kitchens, and other wet areas
  • Protection of exposed concrete surfaces

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Cement-based, polymer-enhanced powder and elastomeric resin
Density (Component A) ~1.30 g/cm³
Density (Component B) ~1.08 g/cm³
Mortar Density 1.70 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Pot Life 60 minutes
Mixture Ratio 15 kg liquid / 15 kg powder
Bond Strength ≥0.5 N/mm² (TS EN 14891)
Crack Bridging (+23°C) ≥1.5 mm (TS EN 14891)
Crack Bridging (-20°C) ≥2.5 mm (TS EN 14891)
Pressured Water Resistance (+) ≥5 bar (TS EN 14891)
Pressured Water Resistance (-) ≥2 bar (TS EN 14891)
Mechanical Strength Time 3 days
Water Impermeability Time 7 days
Coating Time 3 days
Consumption 2.50–3.00 kg/m² (for 2 mm application thickness)

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • Ensure the surface is clean, smooth, and solid. Remove any contaminants such as dust, dirt, oil, or grease.
  • Mix 15 kg of Component B (liquid) with 15 kg of Component A (powder) using a low-speed mixer (400-600 rpm) until a homogeneous and lump-free mixture is obtained.
  • Let the mixture rest for 2-3 minutes and mix again for a short while before application.
  • Apply the mixture in at least two coats using a brush, roller brush, or trowel, with each layer applied perpendicular to the previous one.
  • Ensure a minimum of 6-12 hours of drying time between coats.
  • Use ExperBrace RM 12 Waterproofing Mesh between coats for added reinforcement, particularly in large surface areas.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in temperatures below +5°C or above +30°C, or in rainy and/or windy conditions.
  • Ensure proper curing between layers and avoid applying on surfaces that are frozen or at risk of freezing.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean tools with clean water immediately after use. Cured material can only be cleaned with mechanical means.
  • Store the product in a dry, cool place, and ensure that the packaging is intact to avoid contamination. Protect the product from frost.
  • Shelf life is 12 months when stored in appropriate conditions.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear appropriate protective clothing, gloves, and safety goggles during application.
  • Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case of contact, rinse thoroughly with water and seek medical attention if necessary.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for more detailed safety instructions.

name: S4Floor AB 30 SINGLE COMPONENT, FLEXIBLE PVC FLOORING ADHESIVE
short_description: S4Floor AB 30 is an acrylic-based, single-component, flexible PVC floor adhesive that provides high bonding strength and is ideal for indoor applications. It offers long working time, is water-based, and is suitable for use with underfloor heating systems.
description:
S4Floor AB 30 is a ready-to-use, acrylic-based, solvent-free adhesive designed for PVC and linoleum floor coverings. It provides a high bonding strength and is ideal for use in residential and commercial environments. This adhesive is especially suitable for floors subjected to heavy pedestrian traffic and is compatible with underfloor heating systems.

✅ Advantages:

  • Ready to use and easy to apply
  • Provides long working time
  • High bonding strength
  • Flexible structure
  • Water-based and solvent-free
  • Suitable for indoor applications
  • Resistant to temperature changes
  • Compatible with underfloor heating systems

📌 Application Areas:

  • Indoors
  • On horizontal surfaces
  • Residences, hospitals, educational buildings, markets, shopping malls
  • On leveled concrete slabs, prefabricated concrete, and cement-based screed surfaces
  • For PVC-based homogeneous and heterogeneous floor tiles, linoleum, and rubber-based flooring applications

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Acrylic dispersion
Density ~1.35 kg/lt (±0.1)
Thickening Time 20-25 minutes
Shear Strength (EN 1373) ≥ 0.3 N/mm²
Peel Strength (EN 1372) ≥ 1.0 N/mm²
Dimensional Change (EN 1903) ≤ 0.2%
Working Time ~40-60 minutes
Set to Traffic 24-48 hours
Consumption 250-300 g/m² (depending on the tooth size, flooring type, and surface smoothness)

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • The surface must be dry and free from contaminants such as dust, dirt, and oils
  • The adhesive is ready to use; stir before application
  • Spread the adhesive evenly using a triangular toothed notched trowel
  • Wait for approximately 20-25 minutes before applying the floor covering material
  • Use a cylindrical roller to ensure good adhesion and eliminate air gaps

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply below +15°C or above +30°C
  • Avoid application in high humidity, wet, or frozen conditions
  • Do not add water or any other substances externally
  • Do not exceed the maximum open working time of 35-45 minutes
  • Ensure the underfloor heating is turned off 24 hours before application and turned on 72 hours after

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean equipment with soapy water immediately after use
  • Cured material can only be cleaned with thinner
  • Store in a dry, frost-free environment, unopened, for up to 12 months

  • Keep out of reach of children

name: S4Floor SL 13 SELF-LEVELING FLOOR SCREED 1 (10 MM)
short_description: S4Floor SL 13 is a gypsum-based, self-leveling, rapid-setting floor screed that provides a smooth surface and is ideal for indoor applications. It offers superior durability, does not crack or swell, and is suitable for use with underfloor heating systems.
description:
S4Floor SL 13 is a cement-based, self-leveling floor screed designed to create a smooth and durable surface for subsequent floor coverings such as carpets, tiles, parquet, and more. This product is suitable for use on both horizontal and vertical surfaces and can be applied in thicknesses ranging from 1 mm to 10 mm. It is ideal for use in high-traffic areas, including homes, shops, hospitals, and schools. S4Floor SL 13 offers excellent adhesion and resistance to abrasion, providing a durable surface that does not crack or swell. It is also suitable for use with underfloor heating systems.

✅ Advantages:

  • Easy to apply and self-leveling
  • Provides a smooth, durable surface
  • Resistant to abrasion and dusting
  • Suitable for underfloor heating systems
  • Can be applied with a machine
  • Ideal for areas exposed to heavy pedestrian traffic

📌 Application Areas:

  • Interior and exterior use
  • Suitable for areas exposed to heavy pedestrian traffic (e.g., residences, hospitals, educational buildings, shops)
  • Before floor coverings such as carpets, tiles, PVC, linoleum, ceramic, marble, granite, and epoxy
  • Can be used over cement-based screed surfaces, concrete slab surfaces, and underfloor heating systems

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Cement-based powder with high alumina plasticizer additives
Compressive Strength ≥6 N/mm² (1 day), ≥35 N/mm² (28 days) (EN 13892-2)
Density 1.35 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Mortar Density 2.00 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Mixture Ratio 5.75-6.25 L water / 25 kg powder
Working Time 30 minutes
Walkability Duration 24 hours
Full Curing Time 28 days
Crusting Time 20 minutes
Bond Strength ≥1 N/mm²
Consumption 1.60–1.80 kg/m² (for 1 mm thickness)

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • Ensure the surface is clean, dry, and free from dust, dirt, grease, and other contaminants that may reduce adhesion.
  • If using in areas with moisture content exceeding 4%, use a moisture barrier primer first.
  • Mix the product by adding 5.75-6.25 liters of clean water to 25 kg of powder and mix with a low-speed mixer for 3-5 minutes until a homogeneous, lump-free mixture is achieved.
  • Allow the mixture to rest for 1-2 minutes before remixing for 30 seconds.
  • Apply the mixture within 30 minutes of preparation. The product can be applied by hand or using a floor machine.
  • Once applied, use a spiked roller to remove air bubbles and to ensure the product spreads evenly.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in temperatures below +5°C or above +30°C, or in rainy or windy conditions.
  • Do not apply on surfaces that are wet, frozen, or have moisture content exceeding 4%.
  • After application, do not apply floor coverings until the screed has cured fully, which is approximately 3 days.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean tools with water immediately after use. Cured material can only be removed by mechanical means.
  • Store in a cool, dry area, protected from frost and extreme temperatures. Shelf life is 12 months when stored correctly.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear appropriate protective clothing, gloves, and masks during application.
  • Avoid eye, mouth, and skin contact. In case of contact, wash with plenty of water.
  • Keep out of reach of children. For further safety information, consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS).

name: S4Floor CS 10 FLOOR SCREED WITH INSULATION FEATURE
short_description: S4Floor CS 10 is a cement-based, pumice-added floor screed that provides excellent thermal insulation and soundproofing properties. Ideal for indoor and outdoor applications, it forms a smooth surface with high bonding strength, is resistant to cracking, and reduces the building load, making it perfect for use in residential, commercial, and office buildings.
description:
S4Floor CS 10 is a high-performance, cement-based floor screed with pumice additives, designed to provide thermal and sound insulation. This product is ideal for creating smooth, durable floors with an insulating feature, making it suitable for use in both residential and commercial applications, such as hotels, hospitals, schools, and business centers.

✅ Advantages:

  • Easy to apply
  • Provides a smooth surface
  • Thermal insulation and soundproofing properties
  • Prevents condensation, mold, and moisture buildup
  • Resistant to cracking and swelling
  • Resistant to abrasion and dusting
  • Does not require protection screed, reducing building load
  • Acts as a fire barrier

📌 Application Areas:

  • Indoors and outdoors
  • On floors in buildings such as hotels, hospitals, schools, residences, and business centers
  • On roofs and between floors

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Cement-based, polymer and pumice added powder
Powder Density ~1.50 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Water Mixing Ratio 14.00–15.50 L water / 30 kg powder
Pot Life ~1 hour
Working Time ~20 minutes
Application Thickness 30–50 mm
Reaction to Fire A1
Maximum Granulation Size (Dmax) 3–4 mm
Compressive Strength (EN 1015-11) ≥ 6.0 N/mm²
Bond Strength (EN 1015-12) ≥ 0.5 N/mm²
Capillary Water Absorption (TS EN 1015-18) ≤ 0.40 kg/(m²·min0.5)
Water Vapor Permeability (TS EN 1015-19) ≤ 15
Thermal Conductivity (TS EN 1745) 0.55 W/mK
Consumption 8.00–9.00 kg/m² (for 1 cm thickness)

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • Ensure the surface is clean, smooth, and solid
  • Mix with clean water until a homogeneous mixture is achieved
  • Apply with a trowel to the desired thickness
  • For large areas, use a pump and ensure that the material is spread evenly

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in weather conditions below +5°C or above +30°C
  • Avoid application in humid, rainy, or windy weather
  • Do not apply on wet or frozen surfaces
  • Wait at least 3 days before coating the surface

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean tools with solvent immediately after use
  • Store in a dry, moisture-free area, unopened, for up to 12 months

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear protective clothing, gloves, and masks during application
  • Avoid contact with eyes and skin
  • Keep out of reach of children
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for more details
