name: S4Proof SS 80 SILICA-SILICATE BASED, UV RESISTANT, COLORLESS, LIQUID, WATER REPELLENT AND SURFACE PROTECTOR
short_description: S4Proof SS 80 is a water-repellent, silica-silicate-based, UV-resistant liquid designed for use as a surface protector. It penetrates absorbent surfaces and forms an invisible protective layer, maintaining the natural appearance of surfaces while preventing water ingress. Ideal for use on exterior and interior surfaces such as concrete, brick, stone, and tiles, it provides durable protection without compromising breathability.
description:
S4Proof SS 80 is a silica-silicate-based, waterborne, UV-resistant, and colorless liquid that acts as a water repellent and surface protector. It is ideal for use on both absorbent and less absorbent surfaces, such as concrete, brick, marble, granite, plaster, and natural stone. S4Proof SS 80 penetrates deeply into the surface, forming an invisible barrier that repels water while maintaining the breathability of the material. This makes it ideal for exterior applications in areas exposed to climatic conditions like balconies, terraces, and facades, as well as in wet areas like bathrooms and kitchens.

✅ Advantages:

  • Ready to use, no mixing required
  • Penetrates surfaces effectively and does not form a surface layer
  • Transparent, preserving the original appearance of surfaces
  • Does not prevent the surface from breathing
  • Alkali and UV-resistant, providing long-lasting protection
  • Water-repellent, keeping surfaces dry and clean
  • Safe for use indoors in wet areas such as bathrooms and kitchens due to the absence of solvents

📌 Application Areas:

  • Exterior and interior use
  • Water-absorbent surfaces with a certain slope
  • Outdoor areas such as balconies and terraces
  • Wet areas such as bathrooms and kitchens
  • Absorbent and less absorbent surfaces like concrete, brick, aerated concrete, plaster, marble, granite, travertine, and natural stone
  • Restoration of old or historical buildings for protection against climatic conditions
  • Water repellency applications for joints of coating materials such as tiles, ceramics, and glass mosaics

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Silica-silicate-based, UV-resistant liquid
Density 1.05 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Consumption 150–200 g/m² (depending on the absorbency of the surface)
Drying Time 24 hours
Application Temperature +10°C to +35°C
Packaging Options 20 kg plastic drum, 5 kg plastic drum

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • Ensure the application surface is dry, clean, and free from dust, dirt, rust, paint, oil, and other contaminants that may reduce adhesion.
  • If the surface is concrete, ensure that the concrete is cured and the moisture content does not exceed 4%.
  • Shake the product well before use.
  • Apply S4Proof SS 80 using a roller, brush, or airless spray machine.
  • For less absorbent surfaces, a single coat is sufficient. For highly absorbent surfaces, apply two coats with a maximum waiting time of 4 hours between coats.
  • Ensure that the material does not spill onto surfaces that should not be treated.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in temperatures below +5°C or above +35°C.
  • Avoid application on wet, high-humidity, frozen surfaces, or surfaces at risk of freezing within 24 hours.
  • Ensure that the product is not exposed to rain or excessive moisture during the curing period.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean equipment with soapy water immediately after use.
  • Store the product in its original, unopened packaging, in a dry environment, protected from frost, between +10°C and +30°C.
  • Shelf life under appropriate storage conditions is 12 months from the date of production.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear protective clothing, gloves, and masks during application.
  • Avoid eye, mouth, and skin contact. In case of contact, wash the affected area with plenty of water.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for detailed safety precautions.

name: S4Proof BT 41 MODIFIED BITUMEN-RUBBER AND CEMENT BASED, WATERBORNE, TWO-COMPONENT, WITH CRACK BRIDGING FEATURES, HIGHLY FLEXIBLE LIQUID WATERPROOFING MATERIAL
short_description: S4Proof BT 41 is a modified bitumen-rubber and cement-based, waterborne, two-component waterproofing material. It offers high crack-bridging properties, exceptional flexibility, and superior adhesion to a variety of surfaces. Suitable for both interior and exterior applications, it is ideal for waterproofing foundations, retaining walls, terraces, and balconies, providing long-lasting protection against water penetration and environmental factors.
description:
S4Proof BT 41 is a high-performance, two-component waterproofing material made from modified bitumen-rubber and cement-based, waterborne components. This product is designed to provide excellent crack-bridging capabilities, high flexibility, and strong adhesion to both horizontal and vertical surfaces. It is ideal for use in waterproofing foundations, retaining walls, terraces, balconies, and other surfaces exposed to water, ensuring long-lasting protection against water penetration, especially in high-traffic or water-exposed areas. Its unique formulation makes it resistant to thermal expansion and contraction, providing optimal protection in varying environmental conditions.

✅ Advantages:

  • High crack-bridging property
  • High flexibility, maintains elasticity
  • Forms a seamless and jointless waterproofing layer
  • Resistant to positive directional water pressure
  • Easy to apply by roller, trowel, or airless spray
  • Resistant to thermal shocks, rain, and UV degradation
  • Can be applied to dry and damp surfaces
  • Non-flammable, environmentally friendly, and solvent-free

📌 Application Areas:

  • Indoor and outdoor use
  • On horizontal and vertical surfaces
  • For waterproofing foundations, retaining walls, terraces, and balconies
  • Waterproofing under external waterproofing membranes
  • Bonding of thermal insulation boards to bituminous membranes
  • Waterproofing wet floors, including kitchen and bathroom areas
  • External waterproofing of water tanks

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Modified bitumen-rubber with cement-based fine powder
Density 1.20 g/cm³ (±0.05) (A+B mixture)
Solid Content ~62% for Component A, ~72% for the A+B mixture
Pot Life ~3 hours
Crack Bridging CB2 (≥ 2 mm)
Water Impermeability Class W2A
Resistance to Rain Class R1
Resistance to Compression Class C2A
Fire Response Class E
Consumption 1.5 kg/m² (for 1 mm thickness)

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • Ensure the surface is clean, dry, and free from dust, dirt, and grease.
  • Mix Component A and Component B using a low-speed mixer until homogeneous.
  • Apply the mixture to the surface with a roller, brush, or airless spray, ensuring complete coverage.
  • Apply at least two coats, allowing 4-6 hours between each layer for proper drying.
  • Use ExperBrace RM 12 waterproofing mesh for enhanced reinforcement between coats, especially for large areas.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in weather conditions below +5°C or above +35°C, or during rainy and/or windy weather.
  • Do not apply on wet, frozen, or surfaces at risk of freezing within 24 hours.
  • Ensure the surface is adequately protected from rain, snow, or moisture until fully dry.
  • Do not add water or any other substance to the product during mixing or application.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean tools with water immediately after use.
  • Store in its original packaging in a dry, cool environment between +10°C and +30°C. Avoid storing in areas exposed to frost or direct sunlight.
  • Shelf life is 12 months under proper storage conditions.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE), including gloves and goggles, during application.
  • Avoid direct contact with the product. In case of eye contact, rinse immediately with water and seek medical advice.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for detailed safety instructions.

name: S4Proof BT 40 MODIFIED BITUMEN-RUBBER BASED, WATERBORNE, SINGLE COMPONENT, WITH CRACK BRIDGING FEATURES, HIGHLY FLEXIBLE LIQUID WATERPROOFING MATERIAL
short_description: S4Proof BT 40 is a modified bitumen-rubber-based, waterborne, single-component, highly elastic liquid waterproofing material. It offers excellent crack-bridging properties, high flexibility, and strong adhesion, making it suitable for both interior and exterior applications. Ideal for waterproofing foundations, balconies, and terraces, it ensures long-lasting protection against water penetration, including from unpressurized groundwater.
description:
S4Proof BT 40 is a high-performance, single-component, waterborne waterproofing material made from modified bitumen-rubber. It is designed to provide superior flexibility and crack-bridging capabilities, making it an ideal solution for both horizontal and vertical surfaces. The product is especially suitable for foundations, retaining walls, terraces, balconies, and waterproofing applications in areas exposed to water pressure, including foundations subjected to ground dampness and unpressurized groundwater. S4Proof BT 40 forms a seamless, jointless waterproof layer that maintains elasticity and adheres well to concrete, plaster, and other mineral-based surfaces.

✅ Advantages:

  • High crack-bridging property
  • Easy and fast to apply
  • Can be applied on dry and damp surfaces
  • Provides a seamless and jointless waterproofing layer
  • Resistant to positive directional water pressure
  • Does not sag on vertical surfaces
  • Maintains elasticity and covers capillary cracks
  • Waterborne, environmentally friendly, and suitable for indoor use

📌 Application Areas:

  • Indoors and outdoors
  • On horizontal and vertical surfaces
  • On mineral-based surfaces such as concrete, plaster, screed, etc.
  • Against ground dampness, leaking water, and unpressurized groundwater in foundations, curtain walls, wet areas, and balconies of buildings
  • Under coating in terrace waterproofing applications
  • Bonding of thermal insulation boards to bituminous membranes
  • In waterproofing applications for wet floors such as kitchens, bathrooms, etc.
  • In the external waterproofing of water tanks

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Polymer modified bitumen with rubber additives
Density 1.10 (± 0.05) g/cm³
Solid Content ~ 62%
Full Curing Time 2-5 days
Water Impermeability Class W2A
Crack Bridging CB2 (≥2 mm)
Resistance to Rain Class R1
Resistance to Compression Class C2A
Fire Response Class E
Consumption 1.50 kg/m² (for 1 mm thickness)

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • The surface must be clean, dry, and free from dust, dirt, oil, and other contaminants.
  • If the surface is concrete, ensure it is fully cured and that the moisture content does not exceed 4%.
  • Mix the product before use and apply using a roller, brush, or airless spray machine.
  • Apply at least two coats, ensuring complete coverage and forming a non-porous coat.
  • Allow a 4-6 hour waiting period between layers to ensure proper adhesion and curing.
  • For large areas, it is recommended to use a waterproofing mesh between layers for enhanced reinforcement.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in weather conditions below +5°C or above +35°C.
  • Do not apply on wet, frozen surfaces or surfaces at risk of freezing within 24 hours.
  • Ensure that the applied surface is protected from rain, snow, or water until it is completely dry.
  • In foundation curtain wall waterproofing applications, avoid soil filling without protection after the application.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean tools with soapy water immediately after use.
  • Store the product in a dry, moisture-free area, protected from frost, between +10°C and +30°C.
  • Shelf life is 12 months when stored properly in its original packaging.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear protective clothing, gloves, and masks during application.
  • Avoid contact with eyes and skin. Rinse immediately with plenty of water if contact occurs.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for more details.

name: S4Proof BP 31 BITUMEN POLYURETHANE BASED, TWO COMPONENT, LIQUID, WATERPROOFING MATERIAL
short_description: S4Proof BP 31 is a bitumen-polyurethane based, two-component, liquid waterproofing material that provides excellent adhesion and flexibility. It is ideal for waterproofing areas exposed to water pressure, including foundations, retaining walls, balconies, and roof surfaces. With high chemical and mechanical resistance, it offers a seamless, durable solution for a wide range of applications.
description:
S4Proof BP 31 is a high-performance, two-component, bitumen-polyurethane-based waterproofing material. It is formulated to provide excellent adhesion and flexibility, ensuring long-lasting water resistance. This liquid waterproofing product is ideal for horizontal and vertical surfaces, including foundations, retaining walls, balconies, terraces, and roof surfaces exposed to rainwater, thermal shocks, and other harsh conditions. It is fast curing, resistant to various chemicals, and can be applied with a roller, trowel, or airless sprayer for a seamless, durable waterproof layer.

✅ Advantages:

  • Easy to apply with a roller, trowel, or airless sprayer
  • Forms a seamless, flexible membrane
  • Resistant to thermal shocks, rain, and UV degradation
  • Provides excellent adhesion to various substrates
  • Resistant to water pressure and weather conditions
  • High mechanical and chemical resistance
  • Compatible with concrete, wood, and metal surfaces (with suitable primers)

📌 Application Areas:

  • Waterproofing applications for foundations and retaining walls
  • Flat roofs, terraces, balconies, and veranda surfaces
  • Concrete, wood, and metal surfaces (with appropriate primers)
  • In areas exposed to water pressure, such as sewage tanks and reservoirs
  • In wet areas under ceramic tiles, such as bathrooms and kitchens

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Bitumen-polyurethane based, two-component
Viscosity A: 3,000–5,000 cP, B: 2,000–4,000 cP (ASTM D2196-86)
Specific Gravity A: 0.95 g/cm³, B: 1.05 g/cm³ (±0.05) (ASTM D792)
Shore A Hardness 30-40 (ASTM D2240-05)
Solid Content 85-90% (ASTM D2369)
Bond Strength >2 MPa (ASTM D4541)
Elongation at Break >1,500% (ASTM D638)
Tensile Strength >2.5 N/mm² (ASTM D412)
Mechanical Strength ≥ 5 N/mm² (5 days)
Working Time 40-50 minutes
Touch Duration 2-3 hours
Flashing Point A: >30°C, B: >59°C (ASTM D93)
Volatile Organic Compounds 100-150 g/L (ASTM D3960)
Consumption 1.50–2.00 kg/m² (at least two coats)

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • Ensure that the surface is dry, clean, and free from oil, grease, or other contaminants.
  • Mix the two components (A and B) using a low-speed mixer until a homogeneous mixture is achieved (at least 3 minutes).
  • Apply S4Proof BP 31 with a roller, brush, or airless sprayer, ensuring that the surface is fully covered with a non-porous coat.
  • For larger applications, apply multiple coats, allowing at least 4 hours of drying time between each coat.
  • If more than 24 hours have passed between coats, roughen the surface with a grinder before reapplying the product.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in temperatures below +5°C or above +30°C.
  • Avoid applying in rainy or windy conditions.
  • Ensure proper surface preparation before application.
  • Do not apply on wet, high-humidity, or frozen surfaces.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean tools with soapy water immediately after use.
  • Store the product in a cool, dry area, protected from frost, between +10°C and +30°C.
  • Shelf life: 12 months when stored properly in original packaging.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear protective clothing, gloves, and masks during application.
  • Avoid eye and skin contact. Rinse immediately with water if contact occurs.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for more details.

name: S4Proof AC 50 ELASTOMERIC RESIN BASED, SINGLE COMPONENT, UV RESISTANT, LIQUID WATERPROOFING MATERIAL
short_description: S4Proof AC 50 is a ready-to-use, UV-resistant, elastomeric resin-based waterproofing material. It provides superior flexibility and adhesion for both interior and exterior applications. Ideal for waterproofing flat roofs, terraces, basements, and other concrete and metal surfaces, it bridges cracks and ensures long-lasting water resistance while allowing the concrete to breathe.
description:
S4Proof AC 50 is a high-performance, single-component waterproofing material made from elastomeric resins. It forms a flexible, non-porous layer that offers exceptional water resistance. This product is ideal for waterproofing surfaces such as flat roofs, terraces, balconies, basement walls, and foundations. Its high elasticity ensures that it maintains water resistance even in challenging conditions, such as high winds and heavy rainfall. It can be used on mineral-based surfaces as well as on metal surfaces like zinc and aluminum. The product can be applied with a roller, brush, or airless spray, and is especially effective in areas exposed to water pressure or foot traffic.

✅ Advantages:

  • Ready to use, no mixing required
  • UV-resistant for long-lasting protection
  • High flexibility, maintains elasticity at low temperatures
  • Bridges capillary cracks
  • Permeable to water vapor, allowing the surface to breathe
  • Non-toxic and solvent-free, suitable for potable water contact
  • Resistant to light pedestrian traffic
  • Can be painted with water-based paints
  • Easy to apply with roller, brush, or spray

📌 Application Areas:

  • Indoors and outdoors
  • On horizontal and vertical surfaces
  • On mineral-based surfaces, zinc, aluminum, and sheet metal
  • Flat roofs, terraces, balconies
  • In waterproofing applications of wet floors such as kitchens and bathrooms
  • Waterproofing of parapet edges, gutters, chimneys

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Elastomeric resin
Density 1.40 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Bond Strength ≥ 1.0 N/mm²
Elongation at Break ≥ 400%
Capillary Water Absorption ≤ 0.1 kg/m²h0.5
Crack Bridging (+20°C) ≥ 2 mm
Crack Bridging (-5°C) ≥ 1 mm
Touch Time 2 hours
Drying Time 48 hours
Time to Gain Mechanical Strength 7 days
Consumption 1.50–2.00 kg/m² (for 1 mm thickness)

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • The surface must be clean, dry, and free from contaminants like dust, grease, and oil.
  • If the surface is damaged or unstable, repair with the appropriate ExperRepair product.
  • Ensure the temperature during application is between +10°C and +35°C.
  • Apply S4Proof AC 50 with a brush, roller, or airless spray machine.
  • Apply at least two coats, with each coat being perpendicular to the previous one.
  • Allow a 6-hour waiting time between coats.
  • If waterproofing walkable roofs or areas under water pressure, use ExperBrace RM 12 sealing mesh between coats for additional support.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in weather conditions below +5°C or above +35°C, or in rainy or windy weather.
  • Do not apply on wet, high humidity, or frozen surfaces, or surfaces at risk of freezing within 24 hours.
  • Ensure the surface is protected from water, rain, dew, snow, or hail until the product is completely dry.
  • S4Proof AC 50 is not suitable for application against negative directional water pressure.
  • Not recommended for use in water tanks or swimming pools under constant water pressure.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean tools with soapy water immediately after use.
  • Store the product in a dry, cool place, protected from frost, between +10°C and +30°C.
  • Shelf life is 12 months from the production date when stored properly.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear protective clothing, gloves, and masks during application.
  • Avoid contact with eyes and skin. Rinse immediately with water in case of contact.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for more detailed safety information.

name: S4Prime BP 40 BITUMEN BASED, SINGLE COMPONENT WATERPROOFING PRIMER
short_description: S4Prime BP 40 is a bitumen emulsion-based, single-component waterproofing primer. It provides excellent adhesion and is easy to apply, forming a strong bond before bitumen-based liquid or membrane-type waterproofing applications. Ideal for use on foundation walls, basements, terraces, balconies, and other concrete surfaces, it ensures long-lasting water resistance.
description:
S4Prime BP 40 is a high-quality, bitumen emulsion-based primer designed for enhancing adhesion prior to the application of bitumen-based waterproofing materials. This single-component primer is easy to apply and does not require heating or thinning. It forms a durable, non-porous coat that enhances bonding strength, ensuring optimal adhesion between the concrete surface and waterproofing membrane. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications, it is ideal for foundation walls, basement floors, terraces, balconies, and other surfaces that require waterproofing.

✅ Advantages:

  • Ready to use and easy to apply
  • Prevents rapid water loss from applied waterproofing material
  • Environmentally friendly, waterborne formula
  • Forms a non-porous, durable bond
  • Provides high bonding strength for bitumen-based waterproofing materials
  • Can be applied on vertical and horizontal surfaces

📌 Application Areas:

  • Interior and exterior applications
  • On horizontal and vertical concrete surfaces
  • Before bitumen-based liquid or membrane-type waterproofing materials
  • Ideal for use on foundation walls, basements, cellar floors, terraces, balconies, and other areas exposed to moisture

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Bitumen emulsion
Mixture Density 1.00 (± 0.10) kg/lt
Viscosity 20 d.Pa.s
Solid Content ~ 20-25%
pH 11.5-12.25
Full Curing Time 2-12 hours (depending on weather conditions)
Consumption 300-500 g/m² (for single layer)

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • The surface must be clean and dry before application. Remove any dust, dirt, grease, or loose materials that might affect adhesion.
  • For concrete surfaces, ensure that the compressive strength is at least 25 N/mm², and moisture content does not exceed 4%.
  • Use a low-speed mixer to ensure the primer is mixed thoroughly before use.
  • Apply with a roller brush or a brush, ensuring the surface is completely covered with a non-porous layer.
  • If necessary, apply two coats of primer, allowing the first coat to dry completely before applying the second coat.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in weather conditions below +5°C or above +35°C, or in rainy or windy weather.
  • Do not apply on wet, high humidity, or frozen surfaces, or surfaces at risk of freezing within 24 hours.
  • After application, protect the surface from rain, snow, or water for 24 hours to ensure proper curing.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean equipment with solvent immediately after use. Cured material can only be removed mechanically.
  • Store the product in a cool, dry place, protected from frost, between +5°C and +30°C. Ensure proper storage to avoid damage to packaging.
  • Shelf life is 12 months from the production date when stored under appropriate conditions.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear protective gloves, goggles, and masks during application.
  • Ensure proper ventilation in the application area.
  • In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice if necessary.
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for more detailed safety information.

name: S4Cure AC 10 SINGLE COMPONENT, SOLVENT FREE CURING MATERIAL
short_description: S4Cure AC 10 is an acrylic-based, single-component, solvent-free curing compound designed to prevent rapid water loss from freshly poured concrete. It improves the strength, abrasion resistance, and durability of concrete surfaces by retaining moisture and reducing shrinkage cracks. Ideal for use in high evaporation conditions, it is suitable for both interior and exterior applications.
description:
S4Cure AC 10 is a ready-to-use, acrylic-based curing compound formulated to provide effective water retention for newly poured concrete. By forming a thin, transparent, and non-flammable layer, it prevents the rapid evaporation of water from the concrete, thus reducing the risk of shrinkage cracks. It is ideal for use on both horizontal and vertical concrete surfaces in applications such as foundations, roads, bridges, and canals. This curing compound is especially effective in high-temperature, low-humidity environments where moisture evaporation is high.

✅ Advantages:

  • Ready to use
  • Prevents wet shrinkage cracks
  • Increases abrasion resistance of the surface
  • Water-repellent
  • Non-flammable, solvent-free
  • Easy to apply using roller or sprayer
  • Effective in high-evaporation conditions

📌 Application Areas:

  • Concrete applications in high temperatures, low humidity, and high evaporation conditions
  • Indoor and outdoor use
  • Foundations, roads, bridges, and canals
  • Concrete screeds and plaster

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Acrylic-based liquid
Colour White (opaque transparent after application)
Density ~1.05 g/cm³ (±0.1)
Drying Time 2 hours

Flashing Point N/A
Application Temperature +5°C to +30°C

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • If needed, a second coat can be applied after a waiting period of at least 6 hours.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in weather conditions below +5°C or above +30°C.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean equipment with soapy water immediately after use.
  • Store in its original, sealed packaging in a dry area, protected from frost, between +5°C and +25°C.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear protective clothing, gloves, and masks during application.
  • Avoid eye, mouth, and skin contact. In case of contact, wash immediately with plenty of water.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for detailed safety instructions.

It is designed for structural repairs, anchoring, and bonding applications on concrete, masonry, ceramics, metals, and stones. name: S4Tile RS 13 CERAMIC ADHESIVE MORTAR (C2FT)
short_description: S4Tile RS 13 is a cement-based, rapid-setting adhesive mortar (C2FT class) with high adhesion strength and reduced slippage. Ideal for both indoor and outdoor applications, it provides excellent stability and can be walked on after 6 hours, making it perfect for areas that need to be opened quickly.
description:
S4Tile RS 13 is a cement-based, polymer-added, fast-setting ceramic adhesive mortar with reduced slip (C2FT classification). It is designed to provide high stability and adhesion, making it suitable for both horizontal and vertical tile installations, including ceramic, granite, marble, and decorative brick tiles. This high-performance mortar ensures excellent bonding strength and offers resistance to water, frost, and thermal shocks, making it ideal for use in both interior and exterior applications, including high-traffic environments like shopping malls, hospitals, and educational buildings.

✅ Advantages:

  • Fast-setting and easy to apply
  • High adhesion strength and reduced slip
  • Resistant to water, frost, and thermal shocks
  • Suitable for both horizontal and vertical applications
  • Does not sag on vertical surfaces
  • Perfect for medium and large-sized ceramic, granite, marble, and natural stone tiles
  • Ideal for use in high-traffic areas

📌 Application Areas:

  • Indoors and outdoors
  • On horizontal and vertical surfaces
  • For ceramic, granite, marble, mosaic, and decorative bricks
  • In environments exposed to heavy pedestrian traffic, such as educational buildings, hospitals, and shopping malls
  • Underfloor heating systems

⚙️ Technical Specifications:

Property Value
Chemical Structure Cement-based, polymer-added powder
Powder Density ~1.50 kg/lt
Water Mixing Ratio 5.25-5.75 L water / 25 kg powder
Slippage ≤ 0.5 mm
Early Tensile Adhesion Strength (after 6 hours) ≥ 0.5 N/mm²
Tensile Adhesion Strength ≥ 1 N/mm²
Tensile Adhesion Strength After Water Immersion ≥ 1 N/mm²
Tensile Adhesion Strength After Heat Aging ≥ 1 N/mm²
Tensile Adhesion Strength After Freeze-Thaw Cycles ≥ 1 N/mm²
Extended Open Time Tensile Adhesion Strength (after 10 minutes) ≥ 1 N/mm²
Pot Life Maximum 20 minutes
Walkability Duration 6 hours
Consumption 4-6 kg/m² (depending on tile size and surface preparation)

🛠️ Application Instructions:

  • The application surface must be clean, smooth, and free from dust, oil, and other contaminants.
  • Mix 5.25–5.75 L of water with 25 kg of powder until a homogeneous mixture is achieved.
  • Allow the mixture to rest for 2–3 minutes and remix for 1–2 minutes before use.
  • Apply the adhesive to the surface with a notched trowel, ensuring full coverage of the tile back (at least 80%).
  • Use the double adhesion method if necessary, applying adhesive on both the tile and surface, ensuring the combing directions are perpendicular.
  • To ensure proper adhesion, apply force with a rubber hammer to expel air.
  • Consume the mixture within 25-30 minutes.

⚠️ Warnings:

  • Do not apply in weather conditions below +5°C or above +30°C, or in rainy or windy conditions.
  • Ensure proper water mixing ratio for optimal adhesion strength.
  • Not suitable for gypsum panels, wooden surfaces, metal, prefabricated systems, or swimming pools.

🧽 Cleaning & Storage:

  • Clean tools with solvent immediately after use. Cured material can only be removed by mechanical means.
  • Store in a dry, moisture-free area, away from frost. Shelf life is 6 months from production date under proper conditions.

🧯 Safety:

  • Wear protective clothing, gloves, and masks during application.
  • Avoid eye, mouth, and skin contact. Wash immediately with water in case of contact.
  • Keep out of reach of children. Consult the Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for detailed safety instructions.

name: S4ALL PRO All-In-One Hybrid Polymer Caravan Sealant & Adhesive
description:
PROPERTIES

  • Single component, easy to apply
  • Resistant to weather conditions and UV radiation
  • Can be overpainted
  • Does not contain solvent and isocyanate, long life, does not lose volume and mass
  • Permanently elastic
  • Tolerates movements in the joints and protects its isolation and adhesion properties thanks to its high modulus
  • Does not cause bubble after application that may be caused by damp surfaces
  • Excellent adhesion to many building materials

APPLICATION AREAS

  • In sealing and bonding application both in outdoor and indoor
  • In floor joints
  • In ship and boat yards
  • On metal substrates as car body and containers
  • Fixing window steps, skirting boards and door fillets.
  • In windows joinery
  • In pre-fabric construction

TECHNICAL DATA

Appearance

MS Polymer Sealant

Application Temperature

+5°C and +35°C

Service Temperature

-40°C and +80°C

Density

1,40 ± 0,05 g/cm³

Tack-Free Time (Minutes)

~ 30

Curing Rate

3 mm / 24 hours

Hardness (Shore A)

40 ± 5

Elongation at Break

> 360%

Elastic Recovery

> 95%

Elastic Modules 100%

0,40 N/mm²

SURFACE PREPARATION

  • Ensure that all surfaces intended for contact with the sealant are clean, dry, and free from oil, dust, and rust
  • Any existing sealant on the surfaces must be removed using mechanical methods
  • Use masking tape to outline the application area. Remove the tape immediately after the application is complete
  • For certain surfaces, a primer may be necessary to enhance adhesion. Ensure the appropriate primer is selected for the specific application

JOINT DESIGN

  • The minimum joint width for bonding should range from 2 mm to 10 mm
  • Joint widths should fall between 6 mm and 20 mm
  • For joints with a width of up to 12 mm, the depth-to-width ratio is 1:1, with a minimum of 6 mm for both dimensions. For joints wider than 12 mm, the depth should be half the width
  • Use a polyethylene backer rod to control the sealant depth, achieve the desired joint profile, and prevent three-sided adhesion

APPLICATION METHOD

  • Insert the cartridge into the application gun
  • Apply the sealant in a continuous motion, moving in one direction, with sufficient pressure to fully fill and seal the joint
  • The product’s smooth consistency makes dry tooling the recommended technique
  • Remove the masking tape after application
  • Clean any excess sealant from the surfaces immediately. Once cured, the sealant can only be removed mechanically

WARNING

  • This product should not be used in enclosed areas, as it cures through exposure to atmospheric humidity
  • While it can be overpainted, the paint may crack if the joint undergoes movement
  • Surfaces that release oil, solvents, or plasticizers may experience a loss of adhesion over time

SHELF LIFE AND STORAGE

  • Store the product in its sealed packaging, in a cool, dry environment, at temperatures between +5°C and +25°C
  • The shelf life is 15 months from the production date

SAFETY INFORMATION

  • Contains trace amounts of volatile chemicals. Ensure the application area is well-ventilated if used indoors
  • Avoid prolonged skin contact with uncured sealant, as it may cause irritation
  • For detailed information, refer to the safety data sheet (SDS)

name: fischer REPAIR FILLER – 551915
short_description:
Top Features
  • The repair spatula saves the wall from ugly drill holes or cracks. The strong white of the putty makes the holes disappear and can be painted over if necessary.
  • Penetrates deep into narrow cracks and covers them perfectly. The filler can be applied precisely with the integrated putty knife.
  • The filling compound is very light and shows no shrinkage with holes up to 12 mm, which avoids ugly dents in the wall.
description:
The advantages / Product description

Gets rid of holes and cracks
Advantages
  • Ultra-light, ready-made acrylate dispersion- based filler
  • Hardens without shrinking, up to 12 mm single layer thickness
  • Compatible with paint
  • Can be used indoors and outdoors
  • Odorless, free from solvents, isocyanate and silicone
  • Non-ageing, good UV-resistance
  • Good storage stability
  • Can be sanded down quickly
Ugly hole in the wall? Cracks or ejected corners? No problem. With the fischer REPAIR FILLER, this can be repaired in just a few seconds. It consists of an acrylic gypsum filler which, thanks to its elastic properties, flexibly adapts to holes and cracks and fills them. fischer’s filling compound is suitable for a wide range of substrates and hardens quickly. The spatula is already integrated into the tubular bag. With this repair set unattractive holes and cracks in your wall disappear.

Application and approval

Applications

The areas of application are:

  • Wood
  • Concrete
  • Plaster
  • Masonry
  • Gypsum plasterboard

Assembly instruction

Functionality
  • Simply remove the safety cap before use.
  • Screw in the scraper attachment as far as it will go to open the tube.
  • Apply the filler in the desired location, slightly overfilling the drill hole and smooth out using the scraper attachment.
  • Works best when tube is squeezed from the bottom.
  • Finally, clean scraper with water and seal tube again.

The ready-to-use, extrudable joint mortar for the long-lasting closing of masonry joints.
Advantages
  • The ready-to-use, sprayable joint mortar means that there is no need to add water or carry out time-consuming pre-mixing work. It enables clean, purposeful work. This means that you avoid dirtying surrounding areas and wasting material.
  • Good adhesion even on slightly damp substrates practically allows for all-weather work and prevents forced interruptions.
  • The structure of the high-quality water-based polymer has been perfectly designed with the visual appearance of the mortar in mind. This ensures a discreet joint and perfect appearance.
fischer Repair AC, the ready-to-use, paintable repairing mortar that has a variety of uses. These include renovating masonry, fixing roof tiles, sealing drill holes or general repair work. The practically odour-free mortar can be easily used due to its stable consistency. It provides very good resistance to weather, ageing and UV. The single-component polymer dispersion can be processed at temperatures between +5 °C and +40 °C, and is temperature-resistant between -30 °C and +75 °C. fischer Repair AC can also be reused. When in the cartridge, it is protected against frost at temperatures down to -15 °C.

Application and approval

Applications
  • Repairing masonry joints
  • Closing masonry cracks
  • Repairing chipped edges
  • Closing drill holes in facing masonry during repair work
  • General repair work (e.g. drill holes with cracked edges)
  • For a better reusability, to close opened cartridges with adhesive tape
Building materials
  • Concrete
  • Pumice
  • Fibre cement
  • Gypsum
  • Wooden materials
  • Sand-lime brick
  • Ceramics
  • Clinker brick
  • Masonry
  • Aerated concrete
  • Plaster
  • Cement
  • Brick

You can find detailed information on building materials in the registration document.

Assembly instruction

Functionality
  • Chemical base: 1C polymer dispersion
  • Plastic
  • Consistency: Firm
  • Practically odour-free
  • Skin formation time: Approx. 10 minutes.
  • Processing temperature: +5 °C to +40 °C (not below +5 °C)
  • Temperature resistance up to -30 °C (fully cured)
  • Weather-proof after approx. 24 hours.
  • Very good resistance to UV, weather and ageing
  • Paintable
  • Frost-protected in the cartridge
  • Free of silicone, MDI and solvents
  • Not recommended for caulking guns with a transmission ratio of less than 10:1 (e.g. KPM1)

name: fischer Injection mortar FIS P 380 C – 59234
short_description:
Top Features
  • Polyester resin without approval for use in masonry.
  • Can be used with anchor rods FIS A, internal threaded anchor FIS E and fischer anchor sleeves.
description:
The advantages / Product description

The reliable injection mortar for fixings in masonry.
Advantages
  • The FIS P is the economical solution for anchorings in masonry that do not require approvals.
  • The FIS P 300 T can be used with stable, standard silicone injection dispensers. No special equipment is required. This helps to reduce procurement costs.
The fischer Injection mortar FIS P is a polyester resin mortar for the economical fixing of gratings, cantilevers and handrails in masonry which do not require approval. The FIS P is processed with the system components fischer threaded rod FIS A, fischer internal threaded rod FIS E together with the fischer injection anchor sleeves indoors and outside. Cartridges already opened can be reused by simply changing the static mixer. This saves time and money during installation.

Application and approval

Applications
  • Gratings
  • Gates
  • Handrails
  • Consoles
  • Pipelines
Building materials
  • Vertically perforated brick
  • Hollow block
  • Perforated sand-lime brick
  • Solid sand-lime brick
  • Aerated concrete
  • Solid brick made from lightweight concrete
  • Solid brick

You can find detailed information on building materials in the registration document.

Assembly instruction

Functionality
  • The FIS P is a 2-component injection mortar based on polyester resin.
  • Resin and hardener are stored in two separate chambers and are not mixed and activated until extrusion through the static mixer.
  • The mortar is extruded bubble free from the drill hole base.
  • The mortar bonds the entire surface of the anchor with the drill hole wall and seals the drill hole.
  • Partially used cartridges can be reused by changing the static mixer.

description:
The advantages / Product description

Universal drill bit with long lifetime in all materials.
Advantages
  • The carbide tip with diamond-ground cutting edges is ideal for drilling in material combinations.
  • The wear-resistant tip is particularly suitable for drilling into harder materials, such as concrete.
  • The universal use in different materials with only one drill saves time and costs.
  • The special spiral geometry ensures optimum dust removal and long lifetime.
  • The hex shank enables high power transmission for rotary and impact drilling and is particularly suited for use with cordless impact wrench.
  • The PGM certification guarantees a precise drill hole creation.
The fischer universal drill bit D-U Hex is ideal for drilling in different materials and material combinations. Thanks to the wear-resistant drill bit tip, it is even possible to drill into harder materials such as concrete. The special spiral geometry optimally removes the drill dust and increases the lifetime of the drill bit. The hexagonal shank enables high power transmission for rotary and impact drilling and is particularly suited for use with cordless impact wrenches.

name: fischer Plasterboard fixing DuoBlade – 545677
short_description:
Top Features
  • High torque when anchor is installed for the feelgood-factor and an optimum feeling when setting
  • Anti rotation lock prevents from spinning in the drill hole
  • Use of commercially available hooks, screws and eyelets
  • PZ2 drive – same drive for plug and screw
  • Self-drilling plasterboard plug for fast and easy installation
description:
The advantages / Product description

The self-drilling plasterboard plug for fast and easy installation
Advantages
  • An innovative product of the fischer DuoLine with intelligent combinations for more power and more intelligence.
  • The self-drilling fischer DuoBlade allows fast and easy installation in gypsum plasterboard and gypsum fibreboard.
  • The black metal tip guarantees simple and safe installation.
  • High torque when anchor is installed for the feelgood-factor and an optimum feeling when setting.
  • PZ 2 drive – same drive for plug and screw.
The fischer DuoBlade is part of the innovative DuoLine and therefore consists of different components, which enable the best possible performance. The self-drilling tip allows a clean and effective drilling procedure. The fixing is screwed in the pre-positioned installation with the (cordless) screwdriver setting tool flush to the surface of the gypsum plasterboard. The fischer DuoBlade is adapted for wood, metal and chipboard screws from 4 to 5 mm thickness as well as different hooks and eye screws. Consequently, it is universally suitable for fixing e.g. smoke detectors, curtain rods and shutters securely and quickly. The DuoBlade is placed in the plasterboard with a conventional PZ 2 drive. No special setting device is required.

Application and approval

Applications
  • Smoke detectors
  • Mirrors
  • Curtain rods
  • Blinds
  • Lamps
  • Pictures
Building materials

  • Gypsum fibreboard
  • Lightweight cement boards

You can find detailed information on building materials in the registration document.

Assembly instruction

Functionality
  • The fischer DuoBlade is suitable for pre-positioned installation.
  • The metal tip for better heat-resistant and cutting characteristics. Especially in double-layered plasterboard.
  • The fischer DuoBlade can be used with wood, metal and chipboard screws of Ø4.0 to Ø5.0 mm.
  • In gypsum fibreboard, pre-drilling with a drill Ø 8mm is recommended.

name: fischer DuoTec 10 – 537260 – Pack of 20
short_description:
Top Features
  • Combination of two material components for more performance.
  • Flush sleeve strengthens the drill hole and allows considerably higher transverse loads.
  • Curved handle allows obstacles to be identified before installation.
description:
The advantages / Product description

Easy to install nylon toggle for high loads in all panel building materials
Advantages
  • Flexible screw mount allows for the use of screws and hooks with different thread shapes.
  • Glass fibre-reinforced plastics and a metal skeleton insert (fischer DuoTec 12) allow the toggle to handle heavy tensile and transverse loads in all panel building materials.
  • Soft grey nylon contact surface distributes the load over the panel surface, thereby minimising weakening of the supporting building material.
  • Standard drill hole diameters and short tilting element for easy installation in narrow cavities, including cavities with insulation.
  • White flush sleeve with snap function allows the plug to be pre-installed quickly and securely in the drill hole.
  • With scale on the grip strap (fischer DuoTec 12) for determining the required screw length (scale value + 20 mm).
The nylon toggle fischer DuoTec for high tensile and transverse loads through 2 components. Easy installation with small drill hole diameters of 10 mm and short toggle element, even in narrow and insulated cavities. Easy pre-installation; the plug does not fall into the drill hole, even without a screw. No cutting, and thus no weakening of the gypsum plasterboard. The toggle element automatically folds behind the panel and gives it its strength. As a result of the flexible stainless steel screw seat, the gravity toggle can be used with wood and chipboard screws or metric hooks and threaded rods with lock nuts. If it hits something in the drill hole in solid building materials, it functions like an Expansion plug.

Application and approval

Applications
  • Kitchen hanging cabinets
  • Living room cabinets
  • Shelves
  • Wardrobes
  • Handrails
  • Pictures
  • Mirrors
  • Lamps
  • Heavy hanging baskets
Building materials

Suitable for:

  • Gypsum plasterboard
  • Gypsum fibreboard
  • Wooden panels, such as OSB boards, chipboard, MDF sheets
  • Steel plates
  • Plastic boards
  • Hollow blocks made from concrete

Also functioning in:

  • Solid materials, such as concrete and wood

You can find detailed information on building materials in the registration document.

Assembly instruction

Functionality
  • The fischer DuoTec is designed for pre-positioned installation.
  • Simple installation with a standard diameter 10 or 12 mm drill bit.
  • The short toggle element makes it suitable for narrow and even with mineral wool insulated cavities. Note the length of the toggle element!
  • Functions like an expansion plug in solid building materials such as concrete or wood. Note, not with metric screws!
  • Flexible screw insert allows for the use of wood, chipboard and metric screws and hooks.

Complete fixing set for fixing free-standing toilets and bidets.

The fischer WC fixing set WB 5N contains all elements required for the safe fixing of free-standing toilets and bidets in a horizontal direction. The WB 5N’s assembly bracket with pre-drilled rows of holes allows for a flexible fixing with two directions. A pronounced edge prevents contact between the screw and ceramics, thus ensuring nothing gets damaged during fixing. description:
The advantages / Product description

fischer FixTainer – with the strong and smart duo
Advantages
  • Two component materials for top load values and intelligent functioning depending on the substrate.
  • Great feedback (feel-good factor) of the plug. You can feel exactly when the plug is installed perfectly.
  • The short plug length ensures fast fixing without deep drilling.
  • The narrow plug rim prevents slipping into the drill hole.
  • The serrated anti-rotation feature prevents rotation in the drill hole during installation.
The fischer FixTainer is a practical and universally useful box with plugs, screws and hooks for the most frequent applications and building materials. The interaction of the ideally matched components always guarantees the choice of a secure fixing solution. Thanks to the transparent lid and the compartments, the contents can be viewed at a glance. This saves time and guarantees that the suitable fixing element is selected. The description of the plug function and an overview of the appropriate building materials on the bottom of the FixTainers ensures extra security for the installation. The fischer FixTainer is easy to transport thanks to the large handle. Several boxed can be connected together with the click system. The removable partitions allow a variable and needs-based division.

Its ergonomic design provides an easy handling and a fast installation with low fatigue. Thanks to its fiberglass-reinforced plastic housing, the FIS DM S Pro withstands extreme conditions. With the matching fischer injection mortars, the manual dispenser offers a perfectly matched system.

name: fischer Cordless impact wrench FSS 18V 600 – 552923 – Set 1
short_description:
Top Features
  • The fischer cordless impact wrench FSS 18V 400 BL is a partner of the worldwide Cordless Alliance System (CAS), including 10 other brands, making its rechargeable batteries and chargers compatible with all CAS devices.
  • The torque of 600 Nm allows comfortable installation even under difficult conditions.
  • The cordless impact wrench is suitable for the installation of fischer concrete screws with a diameter of 8-14.
description:
The advantages / Product description

Content: Carrying case, cordless impact wrench 18V FSS 600, belt hook, Sockets SW 15-21, Test sleeves FUP 12-14.
Advantages
  • The fischer cordless impact wrench FSS is compatible with all Cordless Alliance System (CAS) chargers and rechargeable batteries worldwide.
  • The accessories supplied free of charge, sockets and checking gauges, enable smooth assembly and testing for reusability of the concrete screws.
  • The versatile fischer service concept offers a seamless repair process worldwide as well as the immediate procurement of a replacement unit.
  • The tools are delivered in the compatible L-Boxx, which can be connected by a click system.
The fischer cordless impact wrench 18V FSS 600 is perfectly matched to the installation of fischer concrete screws with diameters of 10-14. The extremely high torque ensures rapid work progress and is perfect for demanding applications. With the help of the accessories included in the fischer equipment case, such as various sockets and test sleeves, a smooth assembly process of the concrete screws is guaranteed.

Application and approval

Applications
  • Anchoring of railings
  • Column bases
  • Pipeline routes
  • Canopies
  • Shelving systems
  • Steel-steel connections
  • Tyre changes

Assembly instruction

Functionality
  • The fischer cordless impact wrench is suitable for the installation of concrete screws in all diameters.
  • Depending on the head shape of the concrete screw, either an appropriate socket or a special TX bit is recommended for the installation.
  • For optimum installation, the machine must be positioned horizontally to the screw.
  • The concrete screw is first screwed in and then tightened by the percussion mechanism.
  • If the screw head is in contact with the attachment part, correct assembly of the concrete screw with the cordless impact screwdriver is guaranteed (optical setting check).

name: fischer DuoSeal 8 x 48 S PH TX A2 K NV – 557732
short_description:
Top Features
  • Perfect sealing of the drill hole without any sealing compound.
  • Watertightness approved according to ETAG 022 and DIN 18534 up to water exposure class W3-I. In any case, please take note of the general national regulations on the use of plugs in wet areas.
  • Quick and easy assembly by simply hammering in the plug.
  • Suitable for all building materials.
  • High load values due to the 2-component material.
description:
The advantages / Product description

The sealing plug for wet areas.
Advantages
  • The DuoSeal completely seals drill holes in tiles without additional sealing compound and thus prevents structural damage caused by moisture in the building material.
  • The DuoSeal is ideally suited for tiled surfaces which are exposed to very frequent splashing water and temporarily accumulated water.
  • The universal plug can be installed gently on tiles with very little effort.
  • It´s red component ensures a secure hold in all building materials. Thus, the DuoSeal achieves the same load values as conventional nylon plugs.
  • The stainless steel screw included in the set is ideally suited for installation in wet areas and avoids rusting.
  • The soft plastic rim closes the drill hole completely and flexibly adapts to the shape of the attachment part.
The fischer DuoSeal is a 2-component plug which seals the drill hole in wet areas without any additional sealing compound. The nylon plug with the enclosed screw has been independently tested by the Testing and Certification Institute of the Säure Fliesner Vereinigung e. V. The watertightness is confirmed in accordance with ETAG 022 and DIN 18534 up to the water exposure class W3-I. Taking into account the national and international sealing standards for wet areas, the DuoSeal in combination with the enclosed screw is suitable for applications in commercial, private and public wet areas which are frequently exposed to splash water and temporarily accumulated water. In any case, please take note of the general national regulations on the use of plugs in wet areas.

Application and approval

Applications

In tiled non-permanent wet areas like:

  • Bathrooms
  • Kitchens
  • Spas
  • Swimming pool surroundings
  • Sports facilities
  • Laundry rooms

Suitable for:

  • Accessories
  • Faucets
  • Shower panels
  • Mirrors
  • Shelves
  • Hair dryer holders
  • Kitchen accessories
  • Tubes
Building materials
  • Concrete
  • Solid brick
  • Solid sand-lime brick
  • Light concrete (solid brick)
  • Light concrete (hollow brick)
  • Vertically perforated brick
  • Perforated sand-lime brick
  • Aerated concrete
  • Gypsum plasterboard
  • Gypsum fibreboard
  • Chipboard
  • Gypsum block

You can find detailed information on building materials in the registration document.

Approvals
  • 91022001.001 e

Assembly instruction

Functionality
  • The DuoSeal is only suitable for application on tiles and can only be mounted as pre-position installation. A suitable diamond or tile drill should be used for drilling the hole.
  • The DuoSeal can be installed gently on tiles with just a few hammer blows. The rim of the shaft prevents the plug from being set too deep and additionally seals the drill hole.
  • The red component made of high-quality nylon automatically activates the optimum function principle (spreading, folding, knotting) depending on the building material for best hold.
  • The soft grey component is pressed against the drill hole wall by screwing in the screw and seals the drill hole completely.
  • The grooves in the plug shaft compensate for unevenness in the hole, so that the sealing function is guaranteed even if the drill hole is not perfect.

name: fischer Insulation fixing FID 50 – 48213
short_description:
Top Features
  • No pre-drilling necessary in thin layers of plaster. This saves time.
  • With integrated bit mounting. This means that no special setting tool is required. This allows for a fast installation.
description:
Thermal bridge-free installation in insulation materials.
Advantages
  • Since the anchor is set exclusively in the insulation itself, fixtures can be installed without thermal bridges.
  • The geometry of the FID allows for a simple installation in thin layers of plaster, without the need for pre-drilling, thus saving a stage of installation.
  • The FID 50 is used in thin insulating boards from 50mm. The FID 90 is used in thicker insulating boards, and can bear higher loads.
  • The bit mounting allows for setting with standard tools, thus allowing for a fast and economic installation.
The fischer insulation fixing FID is a fixing for mounting lightweight components in plastered and un-plastered insulation panels made of polystyrene and polyurethane. The fischer FID can be set either by hand, or with a cordless screwdriver. The special spiral thread taps itself in the insulating board. Components such as letter boxes, lamps or motion detectors can be mounted using a 4,5 to 5 mm screw.

Application and approval

Applications

To fix lightweight attachments on ETICS facades.
The application areas are ETICS facades made of:

  • Polystyrene
  • Mineral wool
  • Soft wood fibre
  • Alternative ecological insulation boards
Building materials
  • Non-plastered, pressure-resistant insulating boards
  • Plastered, pressure-resistant insulating boards
  • ETICS insulating boards

You can find detailed information on building materials in the registration document.

Assembly instruction

Functionality
  • The FID can be set in the insulating board with a cordless screwdriver or by hand.
  • For thick layers of plaster a pre-drilling (6 mm) is recommended.
  • The special spiral thread taps itself in the insulating board.
  • Fixtures are fixed with a 4 to 4.5 mm screw for the FID 50.
  • Water ingress in the insulation can be prevented by sealing the plug collar with a suitable sealant after successful pre-positioned installation.

name: fischer DuoTec 10 S PH panhead screw – 539026
short_description:
Top Features
  • Combination of two material components for more performance.
  • Flush sleeve strengthens the drill hole and allows considerably higher transverse loads.
  • Curved handle allows obstacles to be identified before installation.
  • With corresponding screw.
description:
The advantages / Product description

Easy to install nylon toggle for high loads in all panel building materials
Advantages
  • Flexible screw mount allows for the use of screws and hooks with different thread shapes.
  • Glass fibre-reinforced plastics and a metal skeleton insert (fischer DuoTec 12) allow the toggle to handle heavy tensile and transverse loads in all panel building materials.
  • Soft grey nylon contact surface distributes the load over the panel surface, thereby minimising weakening of the supporting building material.
  • Standard drill hole diameters and short tilting element for easy installation in narrow cavities, including cavities with insulation.
  • White flush sleeve with snap function allows the plug to be pre-installed quickly and securely in the drill hole.
  • With scale on the grip strap (fischer DuoTec 12) for determining the required screw length (scale value + 20 mm).
The nylon toggle fischer DuoTec for high tensile and transverse loads through 2 components. Easy installation with small drill hole diameters of 10 mm and short toggle element, even in narrow and insulated cavities. Easy pre-installation; the plug does not fall into the drill hole, even without a screw. No cutting, and thus no weakening of the gypsum plasterboard. The toggle element automatically folds behind the panel and gives it its strength. As a result of the flexible stainless steel screw seat, the gravity toggle can be used with wood and chipboard screws or metric hooks and threaded rods with lock nuts. If it hits something in the drill hole in solid building materials, it functions like an Expansion plug.

Application and approval

Applications
  • Kitchen hanging cabinets
  • Living room cabinets
  • Shelves
  • Wardrobes
  • Handrails
  • Pictures
  • Mirrors
  • Lamps
  • Heavy hanging baskets
Building materials

Suitable for:

  • Gypsum plasterboard
  • Gypsum fibreboard
  • Wooden panels, such as OSB boards, chipboard, MDF sheets
  • Steel plates
  • Plastic boards
  • Hollow blocks made from concrete

Also functioning in:

  • Solid materials, such as concrete and wood

You can find detailed information on building materials in the registration document.

Assembly instruction

Functionality
  • The fischer DuoTec is designed for pre-positioned installation.
  • Simple installation with a standard diameter 10 or 12 mm drill bit.
  • The short toggle element makes it suitable for narrow and even with mineral wool insulated cavities. Note the length of the toggle element!
  • Functions like an expansion plug in solid building materials such as concrete or wood. Note, not with metric screws!
  • Flexible screw insert allows for the use of wood, chipboard and metric screws and hooks.

name: fischer Profi-Box DuoPower – 538621
short_description:
Top Features

description:
The advantages / Product description

The practical Meister-Box with fischer DuoPower.
Advantages
  • Two component materials for top load values and intelligent functioning depending on the substrate.
  • Great feedback (feel-good factor) of the plug. You can feel exactly when the plug is installed perfectly.
  • The short plug length ensures fast fixing without deep drilling.
  • The narrow plug rim prevents slipping into the drill hole.
  • The serrated anti-rotation feature prevents rotation in the drill hole during installation.
  • The greater anchorage depth of the DuoPower 6 x 50, 8 x 65 and 10 x 80 means that the plug is especially suited to fixings in hollow building materials, aerated concrete and to bridge plaster.
The fischer Meister-Box, made from a high-quality and impact-resistant plastic, is ideal for workshop and construction site and offers an optimum price/performance ratio. The practical installation box contains a selected assortment of plugs, screws and hooks for the most frequent applications and building materials. The interaction of the ideally matched components always guarantees the choice of a secure fixing solution. Thanks to the transparent lid and the compartments, the contents can be viewed at a glance. This saves time and guarantees that the suitable fixing element is selected. The fischer Meister-Box can be reused.

name: fischer Gas-actuated fastening tool FGW 90F (UK) – 560041
short_description:
Top Features
  • 3 fixings per second.
  • Easy adjustment of nail setting depth.
  • 8,000 nailings per battery charge.
  • 1,100 nails per gas cartridge.
  • Wide range of nails for many substrates.
description:
The advantages / Product description

Quick and easy fastening in wood
Advantages
  • The 90 joules power ensures correct penetration into the working surface with up to three fixings per second.
  • The embedment depth of the nails can be easily adjusted to the application.
  • Maintenance intervals after every 20,000 fixings, under standard conditions, ensure a long service life.
  • Ring and smooth shank nails in different lengths allow universal use.
  • The powerful rechargeable battery with Li-Ion power can be used for more than 8,000 fixings per charge. It is also suitable for the fastening tool FGC 100.
  • The FGW 90F is supplied in the practical XL-BOXX, which is compatible with the L-BOXX.
The fischer FGW 90F gas-actuated setting tool drives nails precisely into the wood substrate with 90-joule setting energy. Thus, up to three fastenings can be achieved into the working surface per second. The powerful battery lasts for 8,000 fixings per charge under normal conditions. The wide range of nails is suitable for a variety of materials, such as solid wood, laminated timber, plywood as well as chipboard, fiberboard and veneer materials.

Application and approval

Applications
  • Wood frame construction
  • Roof battens
  • External cladding
  • Stud work

  • Truss work
  • Flooring
  • Packaging

Assembly instruction

  • The FGW 90F is suitable for a fast and reliable installation with up to three fixings per second and more than 1,100 fixings per fuel cell.
  • For optimum installation, the nose piece of the tool must be positioned correctly on the working surface.
  • The LED display indicates the status of the battery, which is fully charged after 90 minutes (under standard conditions). After a charging time of only 10 minutes, 300 more nails can be fixed.
  • The FGW 90F will operate within the temperature range of -7°C to +50°C.
  • The tool can be easily transported and stored with the adjustable hook.

name: fischer cavity fixing DuoHM 5 x 55 S PH PZ, Panhead screw, PZ-drive – Pack of 25 – 572921
short_description:
• Up to 50% faster installation than comparable panel plugs
  • Easy installation with cordless screwdriver without setting tool
  • One plug length per diameter for all common building material thicknesses
  • High loads thanks to 2-component technology
  • Nylon plug edge prevents damage to the building material surface
  • Pack of 25
description:
One panel plug for all common building material thicknesses.
Advantages
  • The DuoHM can be installed quickly and easily using a cordless screwdriver without additional setting tools. This reduces installation time by up to 50% compared to conventional panel plugs.
  • The unique 2-component technology meets high load requirements. The metal sleeve presses against the back of the panel and the nylon base body knots in the building material.
  • One plug length covers all common building material thicknesses from 9.5-30mm for flexible and cost-efficient use.
  • Thanks to the metric internal thread, the screw can be unscrewed and screwed in again several times.
  • The nylon anti-rotation lock ensures correct installation and also prevents damage to the building material.
  • The fixing is no longer visible behind the attachment part due to the narrow plug edge.
The DuoHM cavity plug covers all common building material thicknesses from 9.5-30 mm with just one length. Thanks to the unique combination of nylon and metal, the DuoHM enables high loads and maximum flexibility in panel building materials. The metal sleeve folds behind the building material and presses against the back of the panel, while the plastic part knots in the panel. The DuoHM is installed quickly and easily using a cordless screwdriver without any additional setting tools. This reduces the installation time by up to 50% compared to conventional panel plugs. Thanks to the metric internal thread, the attachment can be screwed in and unscrewed several times. In addition to the screw supplied, the DuoHM can also be used with other metric screws. The nylon anti-rotation lock protects the surface of the building material from damage. Due to the narrow plug edge, the anchor is no longer visible behind the attachment.

Application and approval

Applications
  • Pictures
  • TV mountings
  • Lamps
  • Wall shelves
  • Towel rails
  • Mirror cabinets
  • Curtain rails
  • Substructures
Building materials
  • Plasterboard and gypsum fiberboards
  • Hollow ceilings
  • Wood wool lightweight boards
  • Chipboard
  • Plywood panels

You can find detailed information on building materials in the registration document.

Functionality
  • The DuoHM is suitable for panel thicknesses from 9.5 to 30 mm.
  • The DuoHM is mounted as a push-fit installation, i.e. the screw is installed directly through the attachment part.
  • The metal sleeve folds behind the building material and presses against the back of the panel, the nylon base body knots in the building material.
  • Installation is only complete when the tightening torque is clearly noticeable and the metal sleeve is fully pressed against the panel.
  • Thanks to the metric internal thread, the attachment can be fastened and unfastened several times.

description:
Universal drill bit with long lifetime in all materials.
Advantages
  • The carbide tip with diamond-ground cutting edges is ideal for drilling in material combinations.
  • The wear-resistant tip is particularly suitable for drilling into harder materials, such as concrete.
  • The universal use in different materials with only one drill saves time and costs.
  • The special spiral geometry ensures optimum dust removal and long lifetime.
  • The hex shank enables high power transmission for rotary and impact drilling and is particularly suited for use with cordless impact wrench.
  • The PGM certification guarantees a precise drill hole creation.
The fischer universal drill bit D-U Hex is ideal for drilling in different materials and material combinations. Thanks to the wear-resistant drill bit tip, it is even possible to drill into harder materials such as concrete. The special spiral geometry optimally removes the drill dust and increases the lifetime of the drill bit. The hexagonal shank enables high power transmission for rotary and impact drilling and is particularly suited for use with cordless impact wrenches.

name: Sika FastFix All Weather Jointing Paving Compound
description:
Sika FastFix All Weather is a ready-to-use, self-setting jointing compound designed for paving, featuring Active Resin Technology for superior durability. It hardens effectively without washing out while maintaining water permeability. Ideal for outdoor patios, pavements, and paths, it works best with joints that are wider than 5 mm and at least 20 mm deep. Quick and simple to apply, it performs well in all weather conditions, including rain. Additionally, Sika FastFix All Weather is reusable after opening, helping to minimize waste.

  • For joints over 5 mm wide and 20 mm deep.
  • Fast and easy application – no mixing.
  • All weather – apply even in the rain.

Usage & Application:

Sika FastFix All Weather is a versatile and efficient paving jointing compound that ensures long-lasting and aesthetically pleasing results. Its unique formulation and Active Resin Technology make it suitable for various outdoor paving projects.

Suitable for Use On:

  1. Flagstones:
    • Ideal for traditional and natural stone flagstone pathways or patios.
    • Ensures stable and durable joints while enhancing the rustic appeal of flagstone surfaces.
  2. Cobbles:
    • Perfect for smaller, rounded stone cobbles often used in decorative paths or driveways.
    • Prevents joint washout and maintains permeability even in wet conditions.
  3. Indian Sandstone:
    • Provides a flawless finish for joints in Indian sandstone paving, known for its unique texture and color variations.
    • Withstands heavy rain and varying temperatures, making it suitable for all climates.
  4. Stone Setts:
    • Reliable for tightly laid stone setts in pathways or driveways.
    • Enhances the structural integrity of joints without compromising on appearance.
  5. Paving Blocks:
    • Ensures strong, durable joints for interlocking or standard paving blocks.
    • Prevents weed growth and resists erosion caused by water flow.
  6. Slabs:
    • Ideal for concrete or natural stone slab installations in patios or garden areas.
    • Provides a smooth, consistent finish with weatherproof durability.
  7. Footpaths:
    • Excellent for footpaths in gardens, parks, or residential areas.
    • Keeps paths safe, neat, and resistant to heavy foot traffic and weather impacts.
  8. Patios:
    • Ensures clean and hardwearing joints for outdoor patios, complementing a variety of paving materials.
    • Resists cracking or washing out, even in areas with frequent rain.
  9. Pavements:
    • Suitable for urban or residential pavements, ensuring a stable and visually appealing finish.
    • Supports light pedestrian traffic with long-lasting durability.
  10. Driveways with Light Vehicular Traffic:
    • Effective for driveways accommodating occasional light vehicles such as cars or bikes.
    • Withstands pressure without compromising joint integrity, while being resistant to water washout.

Advantages of Sika FastFix All Weather:

1. For Joints Over 5 mm Wide and 20 mm Deep:

  • Specifically designed to fill larger joints, ensuring effective coverage and durability.
  • Ideal for a variety of paving materials, including irregularly shaped stones, slabs, and blocks with wider gaps.
  • Provides consistent strength and stability across joints, regardless of joint depth or width.

2. Fast and Easy Application – No Mixing:

  • Ready-to-use formula eliminates the need for messy or time-consuming mixing.
  • Simply open the package, apply directly into the joints, and brush off the excess.
  • Saves time and effort, making it a great option for both professionals and DIY enthusiasts.

3. All Weather – Apply Even in the Rain:

  • Uniquely formulated to perform in any weather condition, including wet or rainy environments.
  • Eliminates delays caused by unpredictable weather, ensuring projects stay on schedule.
  • Can be confidently applied on damp or wet surfaces without compromising the joint’s strength or finish.

4. Robust – Does Not Shrink or Crack:

  • Once set, the compound forms a hard, durable surface that resists cracking and shrinking over time.
  • Withstands seasonal temperature changes and heavy foot or light vehicle traffic without degrading.
  • Ensures a long-lasting finish with minimal maintenance required.

5. Highly Water Permeable – No Pooling on the Patio:

  • Allows water to pass through the joints naturally, preventing puddling and water runoff issues.
  • Enhances the lifespan of paving by reducing water pressure on the joints and base layers.
  • Promotes effective drainage, making it ideal for outdoor areas prone to heavy rainfall.

6. No Waste – Store and Reuse Once Opened:

  • Resealable packaging ensures that leftover product remains usable for future projects.
  • Minimizes waste, reducing costs and promoting sustainability.
  • A practical solution for ongoing maintenance or smaller projects requiring partial usage.

7. Weed Control – Provides a Natural Barrier for Weed Growth:

  • Fills joints tightly, creating a robust barrier that inhibits the growth of weeds or unwanted plants.
  • Reduces the need for frequent maintenance, such as weeding or herbicide applications.
  • Keeps paved areas neat, tidy, and low-maintenance throughout the year.

Sika FastFix All Weather is a premium choice for anyone seeking a durable, weather-resistant, and user-friendly paving jointing compound. Its advanced features not only simplify the installation process but also deliver long-lasting results for outdoor spaces.

name: S4ALL PRO Double Sided Tape Heavy Duty
description:

name: Sikaflex 252 300ml – Caravan & Truck Sealants
short_description: Elastic adhesive for vehicle assembly bonding
description:
Sikaflex 252 300ml – Caravan & Truck Sealants

PRODUCT BENEFITS

  • Bonds well to a wide variety of substrates
  • Capable of withstanding high dynamic stresses
  • Good gap-filling properties
  • Can be painted
  • Vibration-damping
  • Electrically non-conductive

Usage

Sikaflex®-252 is suitable for assemblies that are subject to dynamic stresses. Suitable substrate materials are timber, metals, particularly aluminum (including anodized components), sheet steel (including phosphate, chromate, and galvanized components), metal primers and paint coatings (2-component systems), ceramic materials and plastics. Seek manufacturer’s advice before using on plastics that are prone to stress cracking. This product is suitable for professional experienced users only. Tests with actual substrates and conditions have to be performed to ensure adhesion and material compatibility.

name: SikaTack Panel Fixing Tape 33m
short_description: SikaTack Panel Fixing Tape is a double-sided adhesive polyethylene spacer tape used to hold facade panels in place while the SikaTack Panel adhesive cures. It offers strong peel and shear strength. As part of the SikaTack Panel system, it enables invisible and secure panel installation when combined with SikaTack Panel adhesive and the required surface pre-treatments.
description:
PRODUCT BENEFITS

  • Very high initial tack
  • Bonds well to a wide variety of substrates
  • Fast and easy to apply
  • Release liner easy to remove
  • Fully compatible with SikaTack® Panel adhesives

Usage

SikaTack Panel Fixing Tape is typically used for the initial fixing of panels used for ventilated facades (until the SikaTack Panel adhesive is cured) and to adjust the correct joint thickness. The use of the SikaTack Panel Fixing Tape allows an economical and rapid initial fixing of the facade panels. This product is suitable for experienced professional users only. Tests with actual substrates and conditions have to be performed ensuring adhesion and material compatibility.

Surface Preparation

The SikaTack Panel Fixing Tape must be applied on the pre-treated substrate, as defined for the used SikaTack® Panel adhesive.

Application

Align and apply the SikaTack Panel Fixing Tape over the whole length of the vertical sections and parallel to the edges of the railing profiles. Press the tape onto the pre-treated substrate. The release liner of the SikaTack Panel Fixing Tape has to be removed after the application of the SikaTack® Panel adhesive. Position the panels precisely and press them firmly until they fully contact the SikaTack Panel Fixing Tape. Once the fixing tape is applied, it must not be removed and reused. It is thus essential to position tape carefully. Make sure the product is in contact with both surfaces. If the unit is not correctly aligned, remove used fixing tape, dispose it off and repeat application with new tape.

SikaTack Panel Fixing Tape is compati­ble with all components of the SikaTack Panel System.

SikaTack Panel Fixing Tape needs to be used in ventilated facades applications only by experienced professionals and after a detailed examination and written approval of the corre­sponding project details by the Technical Department of Sika Industry.

SikaTack Panel Fixing Tape Data Sheet

description:

SikaTack® Panel Primer is used to improve adhesion on porous and metal substrates such as aluminum, wood, ceramics, fibre cement and natural stone.
This product is suitable for experienced professional users only. Tests with actual substrates and conditions have to be performed to ensure adhesion and material compatibility.

Technical Information

 

Application

Application Information

METHOD OF APPLICATION

Surfaces must be clean, dry and free from grease, oil, dust and contaminants.
Adhesion on substrates may be improved by adding and/or combining pre-treatment processes such as scuffing, cleaning and activating prior to the primer application.

Primer Application

Shake the SikaTack® Panel Primer can very thoroughly until mixing ball rattles freely. Continue shaking for another minute and apply a thin but covering coat with a brush, felt or foam applicator.
Ideal application and surface temperature is between 15 °C and 25 °C.
SikaTack® Panel Primer has to be applied once only. Care must be taken to ensure that this single application gives adequately dense coverage. Consumption and method of application depend on the specific nature of the substrates. Tightly reseal container immediately after each use.
